programme.desc: Hunter and Dee get a murder case reopened in order to exonerate a paroled ex-boxer and find the real killer.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate mysterious calls to a reporter about a series of murders.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter attempts to apprehend a vicious robbery suspect while he clashes with a vindictive reporter.

programme.title: The 27th Day
programme.desc: An alien from a dying planet selects five humans to carry capsules powerful enough to wipe out mankind.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' Invisible Man
programme.desc: At an awards ceremony, Peter must rescue a Soviet writer being held for speaking out against her repressive government.

programme.title: The Night the World Exploded
programme.desc: Earthquake experts (Kathryn Grant, William Leslie, Tristram Coffin) find trouble at the core, something shaky called E-112.

programme.title: Interpol Investigates
programme.desc: Serial killer Charles Sobhraj spent years evading the police by constantly changing his identity.

programme.title: Interpol Investigates
programme.desc: After stealing millions of dollars from clients and colleagues, Albert Walker flees Canada, taking his teenage daughter with him.

programme.title: Interpol Investigates
programme.desc: Law enforcement agencies in Great Britain, France and Portugal look for a man who travels throughout Europe killing women on trains.

programme.title: Interpol Investigates
programme.desc: Investigators spend seven years searching for a human smuggling organization known as "Snakeheads."

programme.title: Interpol Investigates
programme.desc: Looking for stolen art, Mireille Ballestrazzi of the French National Police tracks thieves around the world.

programme.title: Interpol Investigates
programme.desc: Juan Miguel Ponce Edmonson spent years searching Mexico and Chile for drug lord Amado Carrillo Fuentes before finding out that he died during a surgery to hide his identity.

programme.title: Interpol Investigates
programme.desc: Interpol probes the theft and smuggling of Egypt's ancient treasures.

programme.title: Interpol Investigates
programme.desc: After a mummified body is found in an apartment belonging to peace activist Ira Einhorn, authorities search the world to bring him to justice.

programme.title: Interpol Investigates
programme.desc: DEA Agent Darnell Garcia conducts one of the biggest drug seizures in history.

programme.title: Interpol Investigates
programme.desc: DEA agent Darnell Garcia and his partners become fugitives after they seize 400 pounds of cocaine and fail to turn it all in.

programme.title: Interpol Investigates
programme.desc: Authorities around the world try to track down bank robbers Nova Guthrie and Craig Michael Pritchert.

programme.title: The Life With Larry Mazza
programme.desc: Former Colombo crime family enforcer Larry Mazza interviews JoAnn "Joie Miami" Gallo, whose role in the Mafia grew into a liaison with Santo Trafficante, one of the most powerful Mafia bosses in the United States.

programme.title: The Power
programme.desc: A tiny Aztec idol falls into the hands of three Los Angeles high-school students with devastating results.

programme.title: The Whip and the Body
programme.desc: A sadistic nobleman terrorizes his family, but the relief that the family members feel upon his death is short-lived when his ghost continues the reign of terror.

programme.title: Creepers
programme.desc: An American (Jennifer Connelly) at a Swiss finishing school calls on insects to help a paralyzed scientist (Donald Pleasence) fight a monster.

programme.title: Attack of the Robots
programme.desc: Interpol agent Lemmy Caution (Eddie Constantine) thwarts a mad scientist (Fernando Rey) and his robot hold over people with type O blood.

programme.title: Phantom From Space
programme.desc: Following what appears to be a UFO crash in the San Fernando Valley, Los Angeles authorities hunt for an invisible alien being who is unable to wear a spacesuit or else he will be sighted.

programme.title: Trapped in the Game
programme.desc: Polo is a young desperate hustler looking to make some quick cash. However, the only way he knows how to make cash quickly, is pimping out young women with the help of his crew. When of his crew starts taking girls off the street, the heat threatens to bring down his whole operation.

programme.title: Boxed In
programme.desc: Ria is an up and coming female boxer whose one and only focus is to be the best boxer alive. That's until she meets Tuga, who shows her that a life without love really isn't a life at all.

programme.title: Conflict of Interest
programme.desc: Gabrielle Winters is a successful Deputy Attorney, married to an adoring husband and mother to a beautiful college age daughter (Asia). Yet, underneath this picture perfect life, Gabrielle is haunted by a ghost of her past. Her life unravels when she prosecutes Donte, a man who could possibly be the son she gave up for adoption when she was 17. Matters only get more complicated once Donte sets his eyes on Gabrielle’s daughter. Can Gabrielle maintain this heavy secret and protect her family?

programme.title: Messy
programme.desc: After being sent away to prison for possessing a firearm, Meek Richardson returns home to the DMV to find out his associate Kevin, is killed. Meek seeks to find the truth about his friend’s death, and finds that his enemies are closer than it seems.

programme.title: The Perfect Challenge
programme.desc: Alfred & Della Hughes, a successful couple, face marital strife. Alfred's neglect and an affair strain their bond. Della, overwhelmed by household duties, feels undervalued. Their children witness their parents' escalating conflicts, leading to a tumultuous breakdown. Though their children plead for unity, divorce looms. A family intervention, sparked by a heartfelt gift, forces them to confront their deep-seated love and the possibility of reconciliation.

programme.title: Unsecured
programme.desc: Bobby, haunted by the infidelity of his ex-wife, enters a new relationship with Lakeisha while grappling with deep-seated insecurities. Unbeknownst to Lakeisha, his past resurfaces when a witness claims to have seen him involved in a murder.

programme.title: Troubled Mystic
programme.desc: Tracie is a single mother who meets Corey Daniels, the calculated and “perfect guy” looking for his next perfect family to manipulate by any means necessary.

programme.title: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Jerry, a recently unemployed accountant, and his wife Stephanie face financial struggles after Jerry loses his job. They invite Jerry's best friend and mentor, Lionel, a music producer, to stay with them. Lionel turns out to be manipulative and begins a rivalry between Jerry and his friend Shawn. Lionel also tries to seduce Stephanie by exploiting her financial vulnerability. This betrayal leads to a chain of events that ends tragically, revealing a dark side of Jerry that he never knew existed.

programme.title: Sudden Passion
programme.desc: After reconciling, Ashley and her husband Timothy decide moving to a new town will help them get over infidelity in their marriage. Everything seems to be going great until Ashley gets a job at the local law office and begins a new affair with her boss, Bernard.

programme.title: Sweet Revenge
programme.desc: Gianna will never forget the day she witnessed her father being killed by a gangster name Curtis as a little girl. Now grown up, fate intervenes, and Gianna finds Curtis back in her life. She meets Detective Corey but he doesn't know her past and gets caught up after his wife dies by the gun from Curtis boys. Now the Detective has to be by Gianna's side and fight!

programme.title: Stick Me Up
programme.desc: Held hostage in a diner, ten very different people, learn they have more in common than it appears.

programme.title: SistAhood
programme.desc: Jordyn Dixon returns home to the city of Augusta to reunite with loved ones, but she quickly finds out that things are not the same as she left them years ago. This story follows Jordyn and her circle of friends, who are each on different walks of life in their professions and relationships, but each of their stories and paths are intertwined as each woman must deal with situations in their individual lives that could disrupt their bonds with one another.

programme.title: SistAhood 2: Calling All Lovers
programme.desc: Jordyn Dixon and her group of girlfriends are working to better themselves and each other; however, secrets from the past and grudges in the present will test the future of their sisterhood circle.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Andre and Champaign’s online relationship took off, but she must admit that she’s actually a he! Shane will marry Michelle, but he’s been fulfilling his fantasy with a Dominatrix! Brandy’s wild job now involves her sister’s boyfriend!

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Tashe wants the truth about her boyfriend and another woman; Frank has a revelation that will turn his girlfriend's world upside down; Passion wonders if she should give her boyfriend a threesome.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.sub-title: Lesbians Come Out ... of the Cold
programme.desc: Derrick reveals a secret he has been keeping from the woman he has been seeing; lesbian stripper Diana is on a mission to break up one relationship and start a new one; Summer is a lesbian who cannot stop having sex with men.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Antiatte's friend and sister determine whether she will accept her boyfriend's marriage proposal; two women battle it out for a porn star's love; Britanny says something is fishy about her boyfriend's behavior.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Percy must choose between his baby-mama and his other woman; Mary learns that her fiance has messed around with her friend; Casey wonders whether she should get back together with a man who constantly lies.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: For the past 5 years, Trisha has been having a secret affair with her mother's boyfriend, Don! Next Daniel regrets the day he agreed to a threesome because now he's about to lose his fiancee forever.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: SpringerCam joins Sam on a trucking trip where he professes his love and devotion for two women. Then Edward is here to confess to his wife that he's been having an affair with her sister! When the two sisters confront Edward, he's goin' home alone!

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.sub-title: I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Tasha wants to prove to her ex boyfriend Martin that he's the father of her 4 year old daughter. Martin's sister says that she thinks the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence because they had a threesome a year ago. Who's the real father?

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Anthony believes his ex, Erica and her new boyfriend Jeremy are abusing his son. Next, Lacey is being accused, by her aunt, of physically abusing and neglecting her two young children.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: At 12, Crystal dated 20 year old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months in prison for criminal sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Are they a product of inappropriate love or just misunderstood?

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Three years ago, Manny was accused of sexually molesting Elizabeth’s daughter. While he declares his innocence, Elizabeth has strong doubts and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is he innocent?

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.sub-title: You Failed to Protect Your Son
programme.desc: Taquita’s ex is in custody for murdering her child, but her step-sisters think that she was aware of the man’s abusive behavior! Then, Dianne gained custody of Tanya’s toddler son after Tanya’s ex shook him, but she suspects Tanya is the abuser!

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: When this young man says that he'd kill his own mother if the gang asked him to, Steve decides to hold an intervention. With the help of an ex-gang member, they try to speak some truth into this gangster from suburbia.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Antoinette says her boyfriend is crazy because he is constantly accusing her of cheating. She says she cheated in the past, but she hasn't since.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt repo a car from a new divorcee. Froy and Matt tail a car. A debtor has a seizure.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou, Sonia, and Froy push a classic car up a hill. Matt and Froy;s BMW repo goes horribly wrong!

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou plots a hook and book. Matt and Froy wrangle with an actor. Froy and Lyndah repo an angry owner's car.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.sub-title: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
programme.desc: Matt and Froy interrupt a couple. They repo a car at a pizza shop. Sonia and Lou go to a car graveyard.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Matt repo from a plumber and a slap happy debtor. Then they repo a tractor from a ranch.

programme.title: Sally
programme.desc: Hear from girls who say that they were lured away by a stranger they met online.

programme.title: Sally
programme.desc: Fed up moms want their violent daughters to stop abusing them and thier siblings on today's dramatic episode.

programme.title: Sally
programme.desc: Frightened mothers express the pain their teenage daughters are putting them through.

programme.title: Sally
programme.desc: An expecting teen couple's relationship gets rocky once their families begin to feud.

programme.title: Sally
programme.desc: Sally speaks with men and women who have gone through enormous physical changes over the years.

programme.title: Sally
programme.desc: Children appear on today's show to ask for help with their mother's embarrassing revealing attire.

programme.title: Sally
programme.sub-title: Mom, Stay Away from My Kids
programme.desc: Why do these new moms feel it necessary to protect their babies from grandma?

programme.title: Sally
programme.desc: Dysfunctional families confront the root of the problem with Sally’s help on today’s heavily dramatic episode.

programme.title: Sally
programme.desc: Girlfriends confront their boyfriends who dumped them because they refused to get abortions and refuse to be involved in the baby’s life.

programme.title: Sally
programme.sub-title: My Teen is Going to End Up a Criminal
programme.desc: These moms seek help from Sally for their troubling teenagers.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: A woman discovers her man has been cheating with various women; a woman suspects her husband is cheating with their roommate.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Mr. Panama is back and still cannot decide which girl he wants to be with. Next Chauntey is a transsexual who’s cheating with her lover's brother! Later Chris is back and he's still trying to play Dee and Rhonda at the same time.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Rashelle's here to find out how close Jessica and Richard have really become. Then, Sean says that his dream is to marry his fiancee Jessica by the lake. But before the couple takes the plunge, he's got to get some secrets off of his chest

programme.title: Rope
programme.desc: Two men try to convince themselves they've committed the perfect murder by hosting a dinner party after strangling a former classmate to death.

programme.title: Cannibal Tick
programme.desc: A retired vampire hunter comes to the States to visit his twin brother. Unbeknownst to him, the small backwoods town where his brother lives and the people in it are being overrun with ticks that have been injected with a toxic chemical compound. The bites from these ticks have an unfortunate side effect, they turn people into blood thirsty zombies.

programme.title: Hot Tub Party Massacre
programme.desc: The sisters of the Delta Omega sorority won a free weekend at a luxurious hotel & spa. They planned on having a fun and steamy weekend. However, things go from steamy to bloody when an escaped serial killer checks in to the hotel and crashes their party. The heat will be on at the HOT TUB PARTY MASSACRE!!!

programme.title: The Sect
programme.desc: Kalima, a young foreigner just arrived in Buenos Aires, attends a job interview, without suspecting that the job is with a mysterious sect working in the human trafficking business.

programme.title: Muñeca de Trapo
programme.desc: Es una serie repleta de ternura y amor que nos invita a conocer el mundo a través de los ojos de una encantadora niña de cuatro años, quien nos hará reír y llorar. A pesar de su corta edad, también nos llevará a reflexionar, pues en cada capítulo se transmite un hermoso mensaje que enseña a los niños y hace un poco mejor a los adultos. Muñeca de Trapo es huérfana de madre y vive con su padre y su abuelita. Carlos Alberto, su padre, es un joven ejecutivo de grandes ideales y un corazón bondadoso, que adora a su hija y desea lo mejor para ella. Tal vez por este amor tan profundo, nunca se ha vuelto a casar. Doña Juanita, la abuela, vive por su hijo y su nieta, dedicando todos sus cuidados y mimos para que en su hogar siempre reine la felicidad y la armonía. En Muñeca de Trapo, también disfrutaremos de las travesuras de los amiguitos del barrio, quienes, junto a ella, vivirán las más diversas y divertidas aventuras.

programme.title: Muñeca de Trapo

programme.title: Hechizo de Amor
programme.desc: Ligia Valderrama (Emma Rabbe) es la hermosa y engreída hija de una familia adinerada que vive en la capital. Pero existen secretos que yacen bajo la fachada de una familia feliz. La mujer que ella considera su madre no es la que le dio la vida, y su verdadera madre está internada en un manicomio. A algunas horas de camino del hogar de Ligia vive otra bella mujer con un pasado diferente. Ella es una pobre huérfana criada por una pareja que la adoptó cuando sus padres murieron. Ambas mujeres conocen y se enamoran de los hombres de sus sueños, pero a ninguna se le permite casarse. En cambio, ambas parejas son obligadas a separarse y por un tiempo pareciera que ambas jóvenes se casarían con la pareja de la otra.

programme.title: Las Amazonas
programme.desc: Emiro Lizárraga es un ambicioso y orgulloso propietario de un rancho de caballos llamado Amazonas. Emiro obtuvo su fortuna por medios ilegales, y tiene tres hijas Isabel, Carolina y Eloísa, además de haberse casado recientemente con su secretaria Elvira, una mujer coqueta, calculadora y ambiciosa. Las niñas no se llevan bien con la nueva esposa de su padre, lo que provoca conflictos. Isabel, la hija mayor, se siente atraída por Rodrigo, un joven veterinario divorciado y con dos hijas

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Patricia y Luis Alberto hablan del pasado de su padre y de la documentación que encontraron de una operación de Braulio Alfonso y se dan cuenta que su padre tiene un pasado muy raro. Lucha se va a vivir con Reinaldo a pesar de que ella sabe que él sigue enamorado de Patricia. El Turco trata muy mal a Felisberto porque cree que él se está haciendo el enfermo para seguir al lado de Inocencia. Santa está teniendo sexo con Raúl en el estacionamiento cuando llega Anselmo.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Anselmo amenaza a Andreina con decirle a Leonardo Alfonso que el niño que está correteando por la casa es su hijo. Leonardo Alfonso le habla al niño le dice que si es necesario van a ir a la policía para encontrar a su madre. Inocencia está muy triste por todas las mentiras que le dijo durante todo este tiempo Felisberto. Rosa está hablando por teléfono con Patricia desde la boda de Andreina cuando Anselmo se le para detrás pero lo entretienen y cuando se vuelve para ver mejor quién es esa mujer, Rosa ya no está. Leonardo Alfonso le dice a Andreina que descubrió que lo del embarazo de ella es falso y que por ese motivo no se casó con ella.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Anselmo enfrenta a Raúl para pedirle que no se le ocurra poner sus ojos en su prometida y que le haga el favor de no volver más por el restaurant. Rosa quiere volver a la mansión para ver si realmente Leonardo Alfonso no se casó con Andreina. Ruiz ya tiene el 40% de las empresas Macho Vergara. Reinaldo no deja de pensar en Patricia y le llama la atención que en el bar que estuvieron juntos ella se haya ido sin llevarse su bolso. Andreina fue a ver a su madre para contarle que Leonardo Alfonso acepto a su hijo y le pidió casamiento para vivir todos juntos. Pero en realidad el verdadero motivo es que quiere envenenar a su madre para que no pueda contar la verdad sobre Miguelito.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Rosa llamo a Leonardo Alfonso como Némesis pero en realidad llama del teléfono de Odalys. Rosa lo escucha muy triste y Leonardo Alfonso le pide hablar luego. Rosa va a la terminal de buses a devolver el bus que se robó pero allí la estaba esperando Luis Enrique para que le diga toda la verdad. Andreina se va de la mansión pensando que Leonardo Alfonso ya sabe toda la verdad por parte de su médico, ya que Leonardo Alfonso se olvidó su cartera en el consultorio. Llaman a Anselmo para pedirle un millón por la liberación de Patricia pero él pide una prueba de vida, antes de entregar el dinero. Reinaldo se está casando con Lucha por despecho.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Andreina le cuenta al médico que no tiene hermanos y que su madre no va a regresar de su viaje para realizar el trasplante. Entonces el médico le dice que un hijo también la puede ayudar, inmediatamente piensa en Miguelito. El médico de la clínica revisa a Rosa para ver cómo sigue su embarazo. Leonardo Alfonso averigua de donde salen los llamados que recibe a su celular de parte de Némesis y de Odalys y le dicen que es de una clínica psiquiátrica. Luis Enrique enfrenta a Tomas y le dice que quiere hablar con él de su padre. Pedrito y Miguelito ponen en el jugo de Andreina laxante para que se duerma y así poderle sacar la muestra de ADN

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucía
programme.desc: Patricia solo pasa angustias en prisión y para colmo de males la directora ha impedido que no reciba visitas y aunque el sargento Ruiz intenta averiguar por qué Patricia está en un calabozo se ve impedido de hacerlo. Ella está desanimada pero una reclusa le dará nuevas esperanzas al contarle que un oficial intentó visitarla el día anterior Robert está listo para eliminar a Gaitán y cundo cree que esto será posible Gonzalo lo impide, tal vez necesiten un rehén ahora que la policía está cerca. Lennox tiene una conversación con Cárdenas y éste último decide que quiere volver al servicio activo, para tranquilidad de su esposa él no saldrá del cuartel de la A.T.E.

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucía
programme.desc: Lucía cree que lo mejor para los negocios de todos es formar una alianza entre todas las partes, con Arsenio y su padre Gonzalo. Para esto decide realizar un video conferencia con su tío y hacerle la propuesta. Todos parecieran estar de acuerdo con el plan pero a la vez nadie confía en la otra parte. Miguel mientras tanto permanece cautivo en casa de Lucía. Patricia quien está en la cárcel se revela ante sus guardianas y recibe una feroz golpiza. Por este motivo es llevada a la enfermería. Allí debe enfrentar otra terrible situación, soportar las insinuaciones del doctor, quien la venia observando desde que ella entró al penal. Pero Patricia no cede al acoso del médico,

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucía
programme.desc: Lennox junto a su ayudante, se presentan frente a Narváez para que los ayude a encontrar a Rincón, y así detenerlo una vez por todas. Lo interrogan con el fin de que les dé información. Pero el coyote no sabe nada sobre el hombre que buscan, Rincón aún no lo ha contactado. Por suerte ellos saben que Rincón lo contactará para que lo saque del país en forma urgente. Por lo cual deciden esperar hasta que lo llame para saber su ubicación. Como lo pensaban, Rincón llamó por los servicios de Narváez, necesita salir de los Estados Unidos. Por dirección de la policía, Narváez le dice que debe ir a un puerto,

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucía
programme.desc: Lucía le dispara a Miguel y todos creen que está muerto, pero en realidad Lucía le apuntó para rozarlo con la bala, no para matarlo. Miguel logra nadar hasta un muelle y pedir ayuda, luego lo llevan al hospital y llama a Lennox para decirle donde se encuentra. Gonzalo y Robert felicitan a Lucía por haber disparado a Gaitán y están felices de que esté de vuelta, ahora se dirigen a ver a Arsenio para tratar de armar un cartel nuevo de tráfico de armas y drogas. El staff de Arsenio prepara la isla para la reunión del nuevo cartel y el recibimiento a su hermano, Gonzalo. La Llaga pone unas bombas debajo de las mesas quiere hacer explotar el lugar con todos los Reyna juntos.

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucía
programme.desc: Lucía llama por teléfono a Miguel para decirle que ya están a mano y que cada uno siga con su vida, él le contesta que es todo una farsa lo que está diciendo, él sabe que ella no es una delincuente, que sabe que se tiene que entregar a la policía, ella le contesta que se vaya con Bonny y su hijo pero Miguel le dice que ese hijo que espera Bonny no es de él es de Pablo Zuleta. Cuando Lucía le está por cortar el teléfono, Miguel le dice que él sabe que se va a reunir con su papá y su tío en la isla Margarita, que le diga donde es esa reunión, y que ella tiene que entregarse a la policía. Lucía le contesta que ella no es una traidora, él le dice que de alguna forma ellos sí, porque tienen las pruebas de A.D.N de Ayra y ella no es su madre. Gonzalo,

programme.title: Hechizo de Amor
programme.desc: Ligia Valderrama (Emma Rabbe) es la hermosa y engreída hija de una familia adinerada que vive en la capital. Pero existen secretos que yacen bajo la fachada de una familia feliz. La mujer que ella considera su madre no es la que le dio la vida, y su verdadera madre está internada en un manicomio. A algunas horas de camino del hogar de Ligia vive otra bella mujer con un pasado diferente. Ella es una pobre huérfana criada por una pareja que la adoptó cuando sus padres murieron. Ambas mujeres conocen y se enamoran de los hombres de sus sueños, pero a ninguna se le permite casarse. En cambio, ambas parejas son obligadas a separarse y por un tiempo pareciera que ambas jóvenes se casarían con la pareja de la otra.

programme.title: Hechizo de Amor
programme.desc: Ligia Valderrama (Emma Rabbe) es la hermosa y engreída hija de una familia adinerada que vive en la capital. Pero existen secretos que yacen bajo la fachada de una familia feliz. La mujer que ella considera su madre no es la que le dio la vida, y su verdadera madre está internada en un manicomio. A algunas horas de camino del hogar de Ligia vive otra bella mujer con un pasado diferente. Ella es una pobre huérfana criada por una pareja que la adoptó cuando sus padres murieron. Ambas mujeres conocen y se enamoran de los hombres de sus sueños, pero a ninguna se le permite casarse. En cambio, ambas parejas son obligadas a separarse y por un tiempo pareciera que ambas jóvenes se casarían con la pareja de la otra.

programme.title: Hechizo de Amor
programme.desc: Ligia Valderrama (Emma Rabbe) es la hermosa y engreída hija de una familia adinerada que vive en la capital. Pero existen secretos que yacen bajo la fachada de una familia feliz. programme.title: Adventures of Tarzan
programme.desc: Upon his parents’ death in the jungle, Tarzan grows up as a jungle boy. One day, he saves Ruby, an explorer, who loses her way and they fall in love. However, when Ruby’s troupe tracks her down, they capture Tarzan to showcase him at a circus.

programme.title: Majboor
programme.desc: A terminally ill man, Ravi frames himself for a murder so his family can receive the reward money. But somehow he's successfully cured of his illness. Ravi escapes the police custody and searches for the real killer to vindicate himself of the charge. Will he succeed?

programme.title: Sharafat Gayi Tel Lene
programme.desc: A geeky commoner Prithvi Khurana (Zayed Khan) is content with his mediocre job and steady girlfriend. But when his account mysteriously gets credited with 1 million rupees he seeks the help of his philandering slacker roommate Sam (Rannvijay Singh) to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega…
programme.desc: Jahnvi’s best friend Pooja attempts suicide when her boyfriend jilts her. Raj, a struggling singer, saves Pooja but she still goes into a coma and Raj gets stuck into caring for her. Upon recovery, Pooja falls for Raj, but he is in love with Jahnvi.

programme.title: Baatein Kahi Ankahi
programme.desc: Watch Baatein Kahi Ankahi with RJ Anmol In An Exclusive Interview With Bollywood Stars.

programme.title: Rickshawala
programme.desc: Two youngsters, Gopi and Kiran, wronged by the men in power under different circumstances end up falling in love and uniting to fight for justice.

programme.title: Maine Dil Tujhko Diya
programme.desc: College stud and a famed band player Ajay is introduced to the stunning daughter of a business tycoon named Ayesha. Ajay is smitten by Ayesha's modesty and coyness and what starts off as a mere acquaintance soon turns into full-blown love affair. But Ayesha's father Mr. Verma is unhappy with their union and his associate Mr. Chopra takes advantage of his discontentment. Mr. Chopra, wanting to take over Mr. Verma's fortune, suggests his own son for Ayesha and brainwashes him about Ajay. The situation takes a deadly turn when a hit-man is appointed to end Ajay's life. But seeing Ajay's aggressive stubbornness to be with Ayesha, Mr. Verma gives him a challenge, to find his lady-love within a day or leave from her life forever. Ajay accepts the challenge, unaware that a bigger conspiracy is at work to tear them apart once and for all.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: Two Became Three
programme.desc: Life hasn't slowed down since their happily ever after. Now the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are officially a family as they announce the birth of their new son, Archie Harrison Mountbatten-Windsor. Celebrate this momentous occasion and get up close and personal with one of the most beloved couples in the world as the continue to break all the rules and reshape the British Royal Family for the modern age. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: Your Royal Invitation
programme.desc: You are invited to the most anticipated royal event of the year. The long-awaited wedding of Great Britain's Prince Harry and American actress, activist and sweetheart Meghan Markle. On November 27th, 2017 the couple will be in Windsor Castle. This show follows the build-up to the big day. We'll inspect the plans, uncover how this is going to be, and chart Meghan's journey from young star to Royal Princess. Including interviews with royal experts, people who know them best, and the couple themselves. May 19th 2018. Remember the date. Because this is Your Royal Invitation. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: The Taylor Swift Story: Dare To Dream
programme.desc: The incredible journey of Taylor Swift all began with a girl, a guitar and a dream. Taylor Swift is a ten time Grammy winner, and the youngest recipient in history of the music industry’s highest honor, follow the story of an artist who turned a childhood dream into an empire. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Betting on Zero
programme.desc: From director Ted Braun comes a riveting docu-thriller following controversial hedge fund titan Bill Ackman as he puts one billion dollars on the line in his crusade to expose Herbalife as the largest pyramid scheme in history. Blending tales of high-stakes corporate intrigue with working class people caught in the crossfire, Braun paints a stirring picture of the American Dream gone wrong. Directed by Ted Braun.

programme.title: The Moviemakers: Scorsese
programme.desc: 60 years since his directorial debut, Martin Scorsese's life has been dedicated to the past, present and future of cinema. 26 feature films later, the aptly named Caretaker of Cinema continues to push the boundaries of moviemaking. Directed by Louis Dubreuil.

programme.title: Killed Walking Home
programme.desc: Every three days, a woman is killed in the UK. These women could be sisters, daughters, and friends. Although there is a lead that breaks open the case - what comes in light of the investigation is one that leaves an everlasting scar on the families.Directed by Afsheen Hussein, Jordan Hill, and Brian Aabech.

programme.title: Depp VS Heard: All On The Line
programme.desc: A trial that has divided fans and sent social and broadcast media into a frenzy. Two of the largest actors of modern-day (Johnny Depp and Amber Heard) go head to head in the court of law and public opinion. A gruelling 5 weeks. 50 million dollars on the line and a defamation case that will leave only one of them victorious. Everything is on the line in this battle of the century. This is… Depp vs Heard: All On The Line. Directed by Lucy Ciara McCutcheon.

programme.title: Depp VS Heard: The Verdict
programme.desc: April 2022. The world was watching the defamation trial of Johnny Depp vs Amber Heard, a murky, perplexing trial - at its centre one significant conflict. After deliberations the verdict was in... Directed by Lucy Ciara McCutcheon.

programme.title: Elton John: A Life In Song
programme.desc: Elton John's career has spanned decades, but his legacy is more than just his music. Reginald Dwight's early debut was in the band Bluesology - there he would meet lyricist Bernie Taupin whom he would go on to write over 30 albums with. After parting ways with the band and his birth name, the Rocketman was born. Directed by Finlay Bald.

programme.title: Elvis & Priscilla: Conditional Love
programme.desc: Elvis and Priscilla are one of the most famous celebrity couples of all time. But the story that lies beneath the glamorous facade is more toxic than what first meets the eye. Elvis has defined Pricilla's life. His comment that she was "young enough that he could train her any way he wanted,", in the end, came true. Though their relationship was bound by true love, what were the conditions that let it flourish? Directed by Finlay Bald.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan The Complete Story: The Meeting
programme.desc: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle, Duke and Duchess of Sussex, are the modern-day fairytale we deserve. From the first whispers of a possible romance between the former Suits actress and former bad-boy of Kensington Palace to a wedding straight out of a Disney cartoon, the royal power couple has captured hearts across the globe. Directed by Lucy Ciara McCutcheon.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan The Complete Story: The Wedding
programme.desc: It hasn’t been all unicorns and rainbows for Harry and Meghan. The wedded couple have weathered so many storms and media scandals that you’d think they’ve been married for a decade, not a few short years. Through it all, Meghan has been the picture of grace and poise. And Harry has pushed back against every royal protocol set in stone to defend and support his wife. Directed by Lucy Ciara McCutcheon.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan The Complete Story: The Goodbye
programme.desc: The decision was clear - duty or love? Will their decision to start a new life in America distance them in more than just miles from Harry's royal family Their new life in Hollywood has changed the course of royal history forever. Directed by Lucy Ciara McCutcheon.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: A New Life In Hollywood
programme.desc: Ever since the former Duke and Duchess of Sussex left royal life for Los Angeles tension has mounted between the two households. The world demanded answers and so much more than they could have ever imagined after the infamous interview rocked the world and left the royal family on the brink of disaster. Has their dramatic exit from royal duties changed royal history forever? The decision was clear - duty or love? They opted for a quieter life away from royal duties, although it is obvious that the public and media interest in their daily lives will never truly subside. Will their decision to start a new life in America distance them in more than just miles from Harry's royal family? Their new life in Hollywood has indeed changed the course of royal history forever. Directed by Amber Rondel.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: A Windsor Wedding
programme.desc: You are invited to the most anticipated royal event of the year. The long awaited wedding of Great Britain's Prince Harry and American actress, activist and sweetheart Meghan Markle. Featuring the complete first ever public interview of the couple together on 27th November 2017, it also features testimonials and interviews from the people who know them the best. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: The Next Step
programme.desc: On January 8, 2020, The Duke and Duchess of Sussex made a shocking announcement that sent ripples around the world: they were leaving the Royal Family. To many, this sudden headline came as an overwhelming surprise, but many devoted royal watchers have seen the signs for some time. It seems like Harry and Meghan have just decided that the time and place--is now. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: The Price Of Freedom
programme.desc: Harry and Meghan's decision to leave royal life behind was far and away from the stiff upper lip announcements of the past. This was a royal family feud that had gone completely out of control. Now for the first time, we're taking a look behind the headlines at a version of events few of us got the chance to hear. This is the other side of the Sussex's story from alleged sources close to the couple and recently disclosed accounts. Was there ever a chance this mould-breaking couple would just fit in or was freedom the goal from the start? Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: The Revelations
programme.desc: Ever since the former Duke and Duchess of Sussex left royal life for Los Angeles, tension has been mounting between the two households. Too many questions remained unanswered as the newly-independent couple built their new life together. The world would receive the answers and so much more than they ever imagined after an explosive interview rocked the world and left the Royal Family on the brink of disaster. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: The Royal Wedding
programme.desc: Relive the magic of one of the most memorable weddings in history- the marriage of Prince Harry and Meghan Markle. From the fanfare to the first kiss and star-studded guest-list; see all the best moments from Harry and Meghan's historic wedding day. With footage from inside the St. George's chapel we bring to you the moments from the very heart of the royal wedding coverage. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: Two Became Three
programme.desc: Life hasn't slowed down since their happily ever after. Now the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are officially a family as they announce the birth of their new son, Archie Harrison Mountbatten-Windsor. Celebrate this momentous occasion and get up close and personal with one of the most beloved couples in the world as the continue to break all the rules and reshape the British Royal Family for the modern age. Directed by Jordan Hill.

Including interviews with royal experts, people who know them best, and the couple themselves. May 19th 2018. Remember the date. Because this is Your Royal Invitation. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: The Christmas Dance
programme.desc: After having a traumatizing holiday history, Sarah learns to love Christmas again.

programme.title: Holiday Engagement
programme.desc: Hillary Burns (Somerville) is always struggling in life and love while constantly feeling the pressure to marry from her demanding mother, Meredith (Long).

programme.title: The Longest Week
programme.desc: When Conrad is kicked out and cut off at the age of forty, he crashes with his only friend and falls in love with his friend�s girlfriend

programme.title: Santa Fake
programme.desc: Santa Fake is a musical comedy filled with Christmas spirit and holiday hijinks.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Crystal comes from a wealthy family and loves spending her parent's money. When they decide it's time for her to make something of her life they give her until Christmas to clean up her act.

programme.title: Santa Girl
programme.desc: Santa Claus� only daughter wants to experience the �real world� before she must marry the son of Jack Frost and take over the family business. Cassie Claus sets off to college while trying to keep her famous father a secret.

programme.title: Christmas Crush
programme.desc: When a woman learns of her high school reunion a week before Christmas, she's ecstatic to finally have her chance to win the one "that got away" back.

programme.title: Christmas Survival
programme.desc: Sisters, Miranda (Gemma Whelan, "Game of Thrones") and Lyla (Joely Richardson) come together for Christmas in this heart-warming holiday comedy. However, ancient sibling rivalries flare-up to sabotage the hope for a season of good will.

programme.title: I'll Be Homeless For Christmas
programme.desc: When a petty thief learns that his latest mark is a struggling single mother who works at a homeless shelter, he decides to use his savvy street smarts to make this Christmas one to remember for her and her young son.

programme.title: Already Tomorrow in Hong Kong
programme.desc: Ruby (Jamie Chung) and Josh (Bryan Greenberg) spent an unforgettable night together in Hong Kong a year ago, and now their brief encounter is about to get a second chance.

programme.title: Mercy Christmas
programme.desc: When Michael Briskett meets the perfect woman, his ideal Christmas dream comes true when she invites him to her family's holiday celebration. Dreams shattered, Michael struggles to survive once he realizes HE will be Christmas dinner.

programme.title: London Mitchell's Christmas
programme.desc: London becomes faced with a diagnosis of prostate cancer which forces him to rethink his total outlook on life during the Christmas holiday.

programme.title: Holiday Breakup
programme.desc: A couple falls crazy in love, only to break up right before all the big holiday parties. It's Suckville, so they pretend to still be mad for each other instead of mad at each other. It's the perfect plan-if they don't fall back in love.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: A 16-year-old tries to play matchmaker for her widowed father during Christmastime.

programme.title: Christmas Break-In
programme.desc: Christmas Break-In is the story of Izzy, a spunky nine year-old who gets left at school on the last day before Christmas break.

programme.title: Suspiria
programme.desc: An American newcomer to a prestigious German ballet academy comes to realize that the school is a front for something sinister amid a series of grisly murders.

programme.title: Plan Z
programme.desc: One man has a plan for a zombie outbreak, when one occurs it will take all his will to stick to it and all of his courage to change it.

programme.title: The Dark Side of The Moon
programme.desc: It is the year 2022. A mysterious systems failure causes the crew of a spaceship to be stranded on the dark side of the moon, while rapidly running out of fuel and oxygen. They are surprised to discover a NASA space shuttle floating in space, and board it in the hope of salvaging some supplies. One by one, the crew is possessed and killed, and it is up to Paxton Warner to find the links between the dark side of the moon, the Bermuda Triangle, and the Devil himself.

programme.desc: Behind the mask of Mardi Gras, something sinister stalks the streets of New Orleans. Filmed on-location during the final days of Carnival, a group of friends is preyed upon by a mysterious killer.

programme.title: Bella's Drift
programme.desc: Bella, plagued by distrust for men over the nasty outcome of her previous relationship, closes shop on relationships with guys. She meets Charles, introduced to him as a great guy by her housemate Flora, but soon old patterns start to form. Will she lose out on a great relationship because of the past?

programme.title: In The Pursuit of Love
programme.desc: In his quest to find true love, a young CEO decides to disguise himself and hide his true identity. He meets a female who channelnges his whole idea of love and hustle. Will this be his final bus stop?

programme.title: One More Word
programme.desc: An aspiring actress struggles between her desire and her fears, as she has a hard time completely trusting the man she loves, not helped by the fact that he is desired by others.

programme.title: Rich Guy Poor Guy
programme.desc: Ella is torn between loyalty to a man she loves and her love for the money of another.

programme.title: Officer No.7
programme.desc: When the only son of a middle-aged widow is killed by roadside policemen looking for a bribe, policemen begin to fall like flies with no known cause of death, leading the concerned dpo to invite the assistance of the crime investigation department who send in one of their foremost detectives as more bodies drop.

programme.title: Buddy Goes West
programme.desc: Two outlaws, "The Doctor" and the Indian Girolamo, help a village fight a gang and a corrupt sheriff who has discovered gold beneath the town.

programme.title: Captain Apache
programme.desc: A Native American born US Army officer, Captain Apache, investigating a murder, uncovers a presidential assassination plot.

programme.title: Django Challenges Sartana
programme.desc: Framed for a bank robbery, bounty killer Django's brother, Steve is lynched.

programme.title: Viva! Django
programme.desc: Django is on the trail of some renegade outlaws who raped and killed his wife. En route, he rescues a horse thief from an impromptu hanging. He discovers the man knows who committed the murder. The men team up and head west for revenge.

programme.title: A Coffin from Sartana
programme.desc: After witnessing a brutal massacre, the legendary hero Sartana is ready to do some investigating. Almost everyone in the tiny town of Indian Creek seems eager to buy up the property left behind by the murder victims, ...

programme.title: Tequila
programme.desc: Tequila and Bobo hit the little town of Chedron intending to rob the local bank whose owner, De Koven, is trying to freeze out all the ranchers in the area by the simple expedient of foreclosing on the mortgages his bank holds on their land.

programme.title: Four Gunmen of the Holy Trinity
programme.desc: Arms trafficking with the Indians on the one hand and acquiring documents concerning the ownership of a goldmine on the other are the principal interests of Quin and Gomez, the highly suspicious guests at Papa Martinez' inn.

programme.title: Tequila Joe
programme.desc: A young deputy tries to sober and revitalize a washed up, alcoholic sheriff to take down a pair of warring gangs of criminals in the Old West.

programme.title: Against a Crooked Sky
programme.desc: The eldest daughter of a pioneer family is kidnapped by a mysterious Indian tribe and the eldest son pursues. In order to win back his sister's freedom, he must sacrifice his own life by passing the test of "Crooked Sky" and shield his sister from an executioner's arrow. Along the way, he recruits a broken down, drunk prospector to help him track down the unknown tribe and rescue his sister.

programme.title: Bounty Hunter in Trinity
programme.desc: The townsfolk of Trinity decide to hire a notorious bounty hunter to protect them from a fierce band of Mexican outlaws who are terrorizing the area.

programme.title: The Counterfeit Kid
programme.desc: Jack, a farmhand, accidentally impersonates the notorious outlaw "Bloody" Ben Harris. Now, on a treasure hunt, he must rely on a group of wild misfits to outsmart the outlaw he's pretending to be. With Harris hot on his trail, Jack must find the treasure and return to his true love, Olivia, before it’s too late.

programme.title: Run, Man, Run
programme.desc: Several competing groups and mavericks (including the lead character Cuchillo) are hunting a gold treasure of $3,000,000. The gold was reserved for the Mexican revolution.

programme.title: El Rojo
programme.desc: The Sorenson family is massacred, apparently by Indians. On the site of the killing, a town, Gold Hill grows up, run by a group of businessmen.

programme.title: Brother Outlaw
programme.desc: A man is falsely charged with bank robbery, prompting his brother to break him out of prison.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Ansyl is suing his former tenant for two months' rent saying she was working as a prostitute while renting.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A mother claims her son punched her in the face three times after getting into an argument and then put her in a choke hold; her son claims he was only acting in self-defense.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Claudette is suing her neighbor for jumping her and falsely accusing her of pullling a gun on her daughter.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Kentra wants a paternity test after the man who signed her birth certificate has been in and out of her life.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff sues her ex-boyfriend for a cellphone and cellphone bill and says she caught him cheating; he brings to court threatening text messages she sent to him.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Kaitlynn claims her ex abused her while pregnant with his child and is here to sue him for over $4,000.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.sub-title: Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together
programme.desc: Tylan is suing his great aunt, saying she hired him to paint her house but failed to pay.

programme.title: Cutler's Court
programme.desc: Angela is prepared to call off her wedding if her fiancée, Juan, proves to have been unfaithful.

programme.title: Cutler's Court
programme.desc: A Georgia woman suspects her longtime boyfriend of cheating because he has not yet proposed.

programme.title: Cutler's Court
programme.desc: Since the birth of their child, Canandas denies being the father, so Charisma demands he take a paternity test.

programme.title: Cutler's Court
programme.desc: Former roommates and ex-lovers, Shelby and Natalie, settle a dispute over unpaid rent money.

programme.title: Cutler's Court
programme.desc: Shakeila is ready to marry Kelvin, hoping their trust issues and 15-year age gap won't keep her single.

programme.title: Cutler's Court
programme.desc: A woman says her husband is failing to go the distance in their marriage.

programme.title: Cutler's Court
programme.desc: Ownership of music rights brings former business partners and lovers to court.

programme.title: Cutler's Court
programme.desc: When addiction leads to a family tragedy, the Butlers turn to the judges to learn how to work through their marital issues.

programme.title: Cutler's Court
programme.desc: Mikeyah and Marcus have come before the judges to determine if they should stay or walk away.

programme.title: Cutler's Court
programme.desc: High school sweethearts Darionna and Elijah seek help from the judges after getting a bitter taste of the struggles in marriage.

programme.desc: Deputies save a dog trapped in a vehicle parked in the sun.

programme.title: Sheriffs El Dorado County
programme.desc: Deputy Payne exposes the jumbled and dysfunctional mind of a habitual alcoholic.

programme.sub-title: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

programme.title: Sheriffs El Dorado County
programme.desc: Deputy Campora arrests two men in possession of drugs and with felony warrants. Deputies Brady and Ford enforce a restraining order.

programme.title: Sheriffs El Dorado County
programme.desc: WENET plans and executes a large Methamphetamine cartel raid.

programme.sub-title: Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard
programme.desc: WENET and the SED demonstrate a large scale marijuana bust near an elementary school.

programme.desc: Mark is suing his sister over his home's repair work. She claims that he is lying and exaggerating.

programme.title: Judge Karen's Court
programme.desc: Kent loaned Elizabath five grand to help pay for her dental work but is now asking for it back.

programme.title: Judge Karen's Court
programme.desc: This car-crazy sister claims she was scammed by her big brother's bogus paint job, and wants her money back.

programme.title: Judge Karen's Court
programme.desc: Richard argues that Tanya tried to leave his child's birthday party early so he had every right to stop her.

programme.desc: Colorado Parole Officers relentlessly search for a fugitive but catch another fugitive and find a drug lab.

programme.title: State Parole

programme.title: State Parole
programme.desc: A parolee tries to avoid arrest by hiding under a pile of clothing. A parolee thinks he can outrun agents.

programme.title: State Parole

programme.title: State Parole

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Rachel is suing her landlord because she claims he forced her to lose her job.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.sub-title: You Sold Me A Fake Fish
programme.desc: Bruce says he thought he purchased a real taxidermy sail fish but says he was fooled into buying a plastic toy

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Marlene says she rented a garage apartment in a house owed by the defendant’s mother, and when her son came to the house one day, she kicked her out and said he was moving in. When she told them she needed more than a few days to move, the man deliberately flooded the place. Andrew claims he gave Marlene 30 days to vacate and she didn’t comply. In the meantime the pipe burst and flooded the place. She’s suing for damages and he’s accused of lousy land lording.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Anissa Williams sues her dad, Nathaniel Green, for $5,000, claiming he owes her money despite the heartbreak. Nathaniel argues the money was family kindness and countersues for $1,000 for slander.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: More couples get divorced in the first year of marriage than any other. Dr. Phil talks with newlyweds in crisis about having realistic expectancies and re-negotiating within the relationship.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: These parents say their precious daughters have turned into bullies. Dr. Phil spells out how "commando parenting" will reshape the behavior of their "little mean girls."

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you have a relative scheming to get money from a rich aunt, uncle or even parents when they pass away?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: Mom Needs to Cut the Cord
programme.desc: Samantha and her sister Sarah say their mother, Stacy, is very successful as a special education teacher and behaviorist, but hey claim their mother has allowed their 33 year old brother Ben to live rent free for the past 2 years, while he lays by the pool. Stacy’s husband, Doug, says he moved out and refuses to come home until Stacy kicks his stepson out of the house. Ben insists he is not taking advantage of his mother’s hospitality and kindness; he is just stuck in a rut.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A woman who vanished finally faces her family.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A woman who vanished reveals a dark secret.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jodie says ever since her husband, Edwin, won $1.66 million in a lottery pool two years ago, he has become angry, distant and secretive -- and their marriage has gone downhill fast. She claims Edwin has squandered most of the winnings without her knowledge -- even buying a house for one of his family members without consulting her -- and she can’t trust him. She also says Edwin has a drinking problem, which she claims has resulted in explosive fights and arrests. Edwin denies having an alcohol problem and says he just drinks to escape Jodie’s nagging -- and he feels she’s only with him for the money. Why does he say their marital problems started long before his big lottery win? And, how does he explain his spending? Plus, Jodie’s mom, Linda, says Edwin has become a jerk toward Jodie’s 11-year-old twin girls from a previous relationship, while treating his 1-year-old daughter with Jodie like a princess. Is Edwin playing favorites? The couple sits down with Dr. Phil in a last-ditch effort to repair the damage. Can this marriage be saved?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: I Spanked My Wife with a Wooden Spoon
programme.desc: A man makes headlines for spanking his wife with a wooden spoon.

programme.desc: Patricia, claims she is defying the odds by becoming a record-setting weight lifter while simultaneously battling Stage 3 brain cancer. But her daughter says she’s lying.

programme.sub-title: Young, Privileged, And In A Gang

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A couple struggles to deal with their 16-year-old daughter's pregnancy.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: How to Fix a Broken Family
programme.desc: You've heard people complain, "If I only knew then what I know now, I wouldn't be in this mess," but what about those times when you choose not to see the writing on the wall? Dr. Phil meets couples who say their relationships went from bad to worse after they said, "I do," and now their families are broken.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Gypsy Willis- the former mistress of a doctor convicted of murdering his wife- speaks out.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: My Fiancé Believes He’s a Superhero
programme.desc: A woman says her fiancé made the decision to identify as "Goose Wayne Batman."

programme.desc: A woman says her husband has wrongly accused her of cheating.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: A Father Accused, A Mother Blamed
programme.desc: Is a mother too unfit to see her own child?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Guests claim their pregnancies have lasted well over 9 months– Shayna for one year and Zona for more than three-and-a-half years.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Statistics show that 2,000 teens get pregnant every day. Moms and dads: Watch this show with your teenagers, because it can impact their lives and yours! Two families face off over who should raise baby Miley. Paige, 17, and her boyfriend, Jordan, 18, are determined to raise their child on their own, even though they live with Jordan’s dad, Chris. Nikki, Paige’s stepmom, thinks she and her husband should raise the child, because they can better provide for her, and she wants Paige to break up with Jordan. Why does she believe that Jordan is brainwashing Paige? The teen dad says Nikki is the one who’s controlling, and he’s stepped up to the plate. Will the families come to an agreement? See what Dr. Phil tells them they must do to ensure Miley grows up in a healthy environment. Plus, find out the 10 things teens want their parents to know about teen sex.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A mother faces tough questions from Dr. Phil as they race to get her two daughters off the streets and into rehab.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Two sisters struggles to detox and remain clean from drugs. Dr. Phil shows them a scary glimpse of their future.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil addresses Cindy's impact on Tecoa's sobriety and reunites Sarah and Tecoa with their estranged father.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents express frustration with their twin sons' disrespectful behavior.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Craig and Cherie say the last half of their 16-year marriage has been anything but happily-ever-after. Cherie says Craig is chauvinistic, verbally abusive and demands sex, which she admits she only gives him about three to four times a year. Craig says Cherie withholds sex to control him, and as a result, he has become a slave to his anger. Cherie fears the tension in their household is taking a toll on their 11-year-old daughter, who is often caught in the crossfire of their fighting. Dr. Phil challenges the couple to a communication test. Can they heal their wounds and rekindle their romance? Then, meet the couple who inspired the movie, The Vow. Shortly after Kim and Krickitt Carpenter were married, a terrible car crash changed everything. Krickitt lay in a coma for weeks, and awoke with no recognition of her husband. The couple shares their inspiring, though oftentimes heartbreaking, journey of falling in love all over again. How did they find their way back to each other? And what is it like seeing their lives played out on the big screen? If you’ve ever wondered whether love can survive the toughest of challenges, you won’t want to miss this show! This show contains strong sexual content. Viewer discretion advised.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Officers try to deal with a sloppy and combative drunk. A man gets locked up after he blows all his casino winnings, and a woman gets tricked by her bail bondsman.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An eccentric jail regular is welcomed back. Man fleeing Mexico details the horrors he escaped. Young woman describes her lucrative fling as a stripper. Officers have heart to heart with a depressed inmate going through a breakup with a cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A singer in custody performs for the officers. A woman is charged with burglary, and officers see right through a young woman's tears.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An angry man refuses to cooperate during the booking process. A man claims to be part of the “international police”.

programme.title: Jail

Officers recover drugs from a suspect’s pocket who is puzzled as to how they got there. A woman learns the hard way “what happens in Vegas stays in Vegas”.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Chaos surrounds a routine medical screening of an inmate. In the prison phone center, a smoking pipe is discovered and a mystery ensues. A pregnant woman is investigated over potential sex crimes.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Guards uncover grooming aids stashed in an unlikely spot while combing through a woman's things. An incarcerated tourist threatens to bring in Johnny Cochran for his defense, and a drunk driver awakens to find X-rated artwork drawn on his body.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An inmate swallows a stash of drugs and then comes down with a case of the munchies. A 72-year-old offers an unusual excuse for dealing drugs to teens at a mall, and a woman charged with assaulting a landlord fakes being sick to get out of jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Two sisters go on a mini-crime spree, get caught and find no one will bail them out. A domestic argument about night fishing lands a husband in jail for breaking into his own car. programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Officers transfer an over caffeinated suspect to isolation so he can unwind. A man arrested for DUI while doing donuts in a mall parking lot asserts he was robbed. programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An inmate is subdued for refusing to follow commands. A woman accused of running out on a dinner bill has her jewelry sawed off in jail. After issuing criminal terrorist threats, a man is jailed.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Toting his guitar, an inmate serenades the officers. One man protests his arrest and states that having cocaine is not a crime. A man claims to be an Iraqi War Veteran and challenges his detainment.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man fresh out of prison tries to prove how tough he is. A drunk woman rages against everyone in her path. programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Bloomberg Next Africa
programme.desc: A monthly deep dive into Africa's biggest stories through a Bloomberg lens. Global investors see the continent as one of the top areas for opportunity and growth, and some African nations are well-positioned to be global hubs for development. This show will discuss key steps taken to help deliver on Africa's quest of bridging the gap with global powers, and track capital flows and the direction of funds amid the underlying political, economic and social developments.

programme.desc: Experts offer bold takes on some of today's most important topics and cover stories and investigations at the intersection of business and culture.

programme.desc: Grid failure is a real imminent threat that can lead to life-threatening shortages of heat, food, and water. Protective measures need to be taken. Narrated by Dennis Quaid.

programme.title: Fearless Freddie
programme.desc: Fred Warder called 'Fearless' was as scared as everyone else when torpedoing and escaping Japanese ships in the pacific in WWII. He was a humane warrior who saw his enemy as his brother.

programme.title: King of Cool: The Dean Martin Story
programme.desc: Dean Martin was an undeniable singing, acting and stage sensation. Newsmax celebrates the man behind the martini glass.

programme.title: Foul Play: Athletes Speak Out
programme.desc: Courageous athletes speak out against the woke mob and champion women's sports, Christianity, traditional values, and politics.

programme.title: Voices of Valor
programme.desc: Carl Higbie sits down with three fellow veterans to discuss topics like the failures of the VA, how weak American society has become, and the difficulties veterans face when returning to civilian life.

programme.title: The Wild Geese
programme.desc: A mercenary team comes out of retirement to rescue a kidnapped African leader. While the 'Wild Geese' are fighting and dying in the African sun, sinister figures are working to seal their fate. Cast: Richard Burton, Roger Moore, Richard Harris

programme.title: Upheaval: The Journey of Menachem Begin
programme.desc: The life of Israeli Prime Minister Menachem Begin, a proud and scarred leader haunted by the Holocaust and war who was able to make peace with his greatest enemy.

programme.title: Revolt: The Case Against EV Mandates
programme.desc: A critical look at federal electric vehicle mandates by industry experts and insiders, and the impact they will have on the automobile industry, Midwest jobs, and consumers nationwide.

programme.title: Newsfront
programme.desc: October 7, 2023, was the worst attack against the Jewish people since the Holocaust - sparking antisemitic attacks around the world and fears of a wider war in the Middle East.

programme.title: The Big Focus
programme.desc: John Bachman focuses on the biggest news from D.C., N.Y., and around America!

programme.title: Family Movie Night Special
programme.desc: Interviews with the cast and filmmakers of "Harold and the Purple Crayon", "Saving Bikini Bottom: The Sandy Cheeks Movie", "Inside Out 2", "Descendants: The Rise of Red", and "The Spiderwick Chronicles".
