programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: A country and western singer released a song about Sonic which is making Dr. Robotnik mad and builds a music destroyer robot.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: An energetic salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik numerous gadgets to help Scratch and Grounder capture Sonic. However, Robotnik later comes to regret it when Weaseley's gadgets keep backfiring.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails rescue Lucas, Robotnik's first prisoner, and attempt to reunite him with his girlfriend, Lucinda. However, Robotnik is also in love with Lucinda, and pursues Lucas.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: En route to stop a train of explosives from arriving at Robotnik's munition factory, Sonic and Tails must deal with a duo of bears named Big Griz and Big Mike after Scratch and Grounder tell them that Sonic and Tails are the enemies.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik takes Professor Von Schlemmer hostage and uses his growth machine to try and enlarge himself. However, the machine backfires, and enlarges Tails instead in nearby Wienerville. Sonic must keep the famished Tails from getting into more danger as Robotnik tricks the citizens into thinking that Sonic is the villain, while Robotnik is the hero planning to save the city.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic decides to find Tails a suitable foster home to ensure his safety, Robotnik finds out and creates a robot fox family, who pose as Tails' long-lost parents.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When overweight, elderly superhero Captain Rescue bungles in his attempts to help Sonic, he grows tired of his incompetence. Robotnik then uses Captain Rescue to successfully imprison Sonic in an impenetrable force field, and Tails and Captain Rescue must save him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Scratch suffers a blow to the head and believes that he is his favorite television character, Edgar Eagle. Sonic uses this to his advantage in preventing another of Robotnik's schemes.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: There is a Sonic Appreciation Day happening where Sonic is the guest in a hotel. However, someone steals his power sneakers and now Sonic and Tails have to find the culprit.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him and they soon find themselves spinning through interdimensional limbo.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik opens up a resort to make the resident Mobians his slaves, Sonic enlists the help of some robots from an area of Mobius called Scrap Valley.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik creates a robot Sonic suit with the intent of ruining the hedgehog's reputation. He forces a lab rat named Laurence to pilot by threatening his parents.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Dr. Robotnik creates a genius chip so he would have enough brains to rule Mobius, however a computer hacker got hold of it which then the chip landed inside Grounder causing him to be smart.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic leaves Tails in charge of protecting a squirrel village food supply, when he zips off to stop a dam from breaking. Robotnik sends Scratch and Grounder after Tails, who defends himself the best he can with Home Alone booby traps for Scratch and Grounder. When Tails is finally caught, Sonic speeds back to save him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik introduces the Ultra Freeze-O-Matic, announcing his plan to freeze every citizen on Mobius so that he can install Servitude Chips into the frozen citizens and make them unquestionably obedient. Sonic and Tails must foil the scheme.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff unworthy. Sonic, Tails and Surff must avoid the undersea traps and Mobius sea monsters while Sonic rescues the Princess and reunites her with Surff -- making it look like Surff did the whole thing.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik reprograms a machine created by Von Schlemmer capable of turning dreams into reality, unleashing a Nightmare Monster upon Mobius.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outer space to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars. Sonic builds a rocket out of S and G's spare parts, and all return to Mobius.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's attempt to turn Sonic into an old man with his newest device backfires, turning him and Tails, and later himself, into babies. Now stuck in a day-care, the infantile Sonic and Tails must try to keep Robotnik under control, while Scratch and Grounder attempt to get him back.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness. But when Robotnik Jr. meets Sonic, he becomes a naturalist and teams up with Sonic to thwart Robotnik's evil scheme.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake. Seeing this, Robotnik convinces the villagers that the little fox belongs in jail, and Tails is forced to flee. With Tails all alone, Scratch and Grounder attack, and Sonic makes a last minute rescue.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver). But Mac escapes before Robotnik installs the final Get Sonic program, and teams up with Sonic and Tails to BLAST Robotnik.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic joins up with a group of Dr. Robotnik's rejects who have been banished to the dump and helps them understand that their shortcomings were really their strengths.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outer space to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars. Sonic builds a rocket out of S and G's spare parts, and all return to Mobius.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When a Rebel Base is threatened by Robotnik, Sonic and Tails team up with Big Mike and Da Bears to run a booby-trapped gauntlet in their gigantic Road Warrior-like truck, breaking through every obstacle S and G put in their way until they save the rebels.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik and a rival named Quark Rex try to cooperate in capturing Sonic. However, Sonic tricks them into becoming enemies, and they try to outdo each other.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts acquires a magic wand and magical gadgets from Wes Weasley (after agreeing to forward all payments to Robotnik), and attempts to master them. Meanwhile, Robotnik tries to change Sonic-themed mobium banknotes into Robotnik banknotes in the Mobius Mint.

programme.title: Love Shriners
programme.desc: Dynamic Media Partners - Shriners - PP SHFFT8CGTH

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Super Special Sonic Search and Smash Squad
programme.desc: When Sonic and Tails are captured by Grounder and Scratch, Sonic tricks them into letting them escape by reminiscing about how they all met. Several badniks seen early on in this episode later resurfaced in Dr. Robotnik's Mean Bean Machine.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on pursuit with Scratch and Grounder, Sonic and Tails hide in an underground mine which a miser mole think that they are trespassers.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic saves a female hedgehog from Scratch and Grounder which Sonic falls in love with, while Dr. Robotnik plans to flood a village by stealing the water from the Mobius reservoir.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic saves a female hedgehog from Scratch and Grounder which Sonic falls in love with, while Dr. Robotnik plans to flood a village by stealing the water from the Mobius reservoir.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic must save a family of sloths from Dr. Robotnik's slow-motion ray, but when he himself is slowed down by Scratch and Grounder, Tails and the sloth family must take action.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Desperate to get workers to build a Robotnik statue, Dr. Robotnik opens Casino Night Zone with his pal Smiley but when Sonic stops Scratch and Grounder, Robotnik traps Tails so Sonic has to make a choice to save his pal.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik imprisons a satirical cartoonist named Sketch Lampoon for making fun of him in his comic book, much to the anger of Sonic, his biggest fan. Sonic purposely allows his own capture as well, but does not expect to be placed in a maximum-security jail cell. With Robotnik angrily sends Sonic in the cell for interfering with his plans once again.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Scratch, Grounder and Coconuts set up a chili-dog trap which then resulted with Tails been captured by a mysterious person so Sonic has to find Tails and for Robotnik and co to capture Sonic.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Close Encounters of the Sonic Kind
programme.desc: While Scratch and Grounder try to catch Sonic using a Suction plate, two aliens, one being a prince, crash lands on Mobius. Sonic meets the prince when he finds out that the prince's baby brother would blow up Mobius which Sonic must save.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's momma escapes from the home for mothers of villains and demands her birthday present! When she endangers Sonic and Tails, and they manage to have her taken back to the home, even Robotnik is glad to see her go.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: Have You Smurfed Your Pet Today?
programme.desc: The Smurfs get so involved with Handy's new toy that they forget to feed Puppy. Gargamel lures Puppy into a cage with food and holds him for ransom – the Smurfs' magic secrets. The Smurflings distract Gargamel with the toy long enough to rescue Puppy and they vow to never neglect him again.

programme.title: The Abominable Snowbeast
programme.desc: Brainy and his friends organize a journey to Ice Mountain to pick the rare snow flower for Papa Smurf. They meet a terrifying snow beast that befriends them, due to Smurfette's kindness, and helps them find the tiny flower.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Sir Hefty discovers a wayward knight to help him defeat a dragon whose fire is threatening to destroy the forest. Alas, the knight proves to be a coward, leaving Hefty to prove just how brave he is when he sends the dragon away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: As the Smurfs busily build a time capsule for all of their talents, Papa Smurf frantically tries to unravel an ancient Druid riddle before disaster strikes the forest.

programme.title: Bringing Up Bigfeet
programme.desc: Remember Bigmouth, the ogre, and his lovely wife Bignose? They have a baby now: tiny (by ogre standards) Bigfeet. As the Smurflings Snappy, Slouchy and Nat, and of course the ever-willing Sassette are not entitled to baby-sit Baby Smurf, they volunteer to watch over Bigfeet, while its parents are at the Ogre Ball. The little Smurfs will get more than what they expected...

programme.title: It Came From Outer Smurf
programme.desc: Dreamy wants to encounter beings from outer space so much that no one believes him when he talks of having met one. Yet the arrival of this extraterrestrial is going to wreak havoc in the Smurf Village...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: This time, Gargamel feels sure of himself. Well, almost. He is going to try and finally catch the little Smurfs! Greedy Smurf's lighter-than-air pancakes are almost responsible for the Smurfs floating into Gargamel's grasp...

programme.title: The Great Lime Crop Failure
programme.desc: Bullrush the Wartmonger is in a panic because the lime harvest has failed. So he captures Farmer Smurf, the world’s greatest agricultural expert, to solve his problems. Farmer Smurf installs an irrigation system and saves the harvest. He then escapes in a bubble and returns to the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs discover the spirit and joy of friendly competition when they hold their first "Smurfic Games". After a near miss with the troublesome cat Azrael, the Smurfs decide they need to get into better shape. Papa Smurf suggests that the Smurfs tone their bodies as well as sharpen their athletic abilities by inaugurating the "Smurfic Games".

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: As the Smurfs busily build a time capsule for all of their talents, Papa Smurf frantically tries to unravel an ancient Druid riddle before disaster strikes the forest.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: Tis The Season To Be Smurfy
programme.desc: This is Wild Smurf's first Christmas, and he's impressed by the decorations in the Village of the Smurfs. But Grandpa and Sassette are going to teach him the real meaning of Christmas when they help an old couple to live the most beautiful Christmas they've ever seen...

programme.title: To Smurf A Thief
programme.desc: The Smurfs and Homnibus befriend an unfortunate boy who is forced to steal for his master. Soon, the evil thief is turned over to the magistrate and the boy is happy to live with Homnibus.

programme.title: They'Re Smurfing Our Song
programme.desc: Gargamel casts a spell on Woody's magical pipe to change its music from good to evil. Gargamel captures the Smurfs, but Sassette saves them by telling Gargamel that she loves him. He plays the pipe but the music fades as Gargamel is overcome with feelings of love and releases the Smurfs.

programme.title: Scruple's Sweetheart
programme.desc: Brenda, the little witch, feels rejected: no-one is taking her to this year's Broomstick Ball. Oh, if she could find some nice-looking boy... Then she meets Scruple, apprentice of the evil wizard Gargamel. He's so handsome, and available too! What she does not know is that Scruple's only interest is her magic wand. What the Smurfs know is that they're going to save the day.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hefty dresses like Smurfette to lure an enamored gnome, Piltkin, away from the Smurf Village. They burrow underground and meet a female gnome who falls in love with Piltkin who then casts Smurfette aside for his new heartthrob.

programme.title: The Gallant Smurf
programme.desc: Queen Felicity will not let her son, Prince Godfrey, marry his sweetheart Pricilla. What she wants as a daughter-in-law is a girl who shows her something she's never seen before. When Hogatha learns of this, and also discovers the existence of Grandpa Smurf, she feels confident that she can surprise the Queen with her capture. Of course, Hogatha must first capture Grandpa Smurf...

programme.title: Can't Smurf The Music
programme.desc: There is nothing the sorceress Chlorhydris hates so much as love in the world. She would like to see all love banished from the face of the Earth, and she's going to start with music. She puts a spell on a magic horn so that it will suck the music out of every song... especially the Smurfs' songs. Helped by their friend Laconia, the Smurfs may be able to resist Chlorhydris' evil plan...

programme.title: Educating Bigmouth
programme.desc: The Smurfs try to teach Bigmouth about romance, manners, and getting a job after Bignose kicks him out. He returns to her refined, but Bigteeth is courting Bignose. Bignose realizes what she was missing and takes Bigmouth back to live happily ever after.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A swamp monster kidnaps Baby as a gift for a witch. The witch, who thinks no one loves her, is amazed when Baby shows affection. When Papa comes to rescue Baby, he makes the witch understand that the loyal swamp monster has always loved her.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs learn that the mind is more powerful than matter when they are fooled by a quack's outrageously expensive miracle tonic. But Papa Smurf cures the Smurfs of their temporary naiveté and the charlatan of his villainy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf is aghast. Sassette cannot read, and thus might be forever prevented from learning the pearls of wisdom collected in his book "Brainy Smurf's quotations"! He tries teaching her how to read. What she can read almost from the start is a formula to make all the books disappear! All the books in the world, including Gargamel's spells and Homnibus' books of remedies!

programme.title: Essence Of Brainy
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf is not the same anymore. He is polite, considerate, modest and calls every other Smurf Sir or Madame. All the Smurfs are worried that Brainy has lost all that makes his personality. They ought to be worried, for Brainy has been the victim of a system called an Essence Remover that Scruple, Gargamel's apprentice, uses... But Brainy's essence is coming back!

programme.title: All The News That's Fit To Smurf
programme.desc: Curious Smurf has an idea: why not print a sheet with all the Village news? He's sure to interest all his readers of the Smurf Tattler. But things don't go exactly to plan when Papa finds super smurfberries.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Plotting to rid himself of the Smurfs, Gargamel casts a spell over Bigmouth and disguises himself as a Smurf. Thinking he is a Smurf, Bigmouth nearly succeeds in wrecking everything in the Village of the Smurfs until Papa Smurf comes up with a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Everybody can make a mistake. Take Papa Smurf, for instance. His new perfume-enhancing spray makes a rose smell like a thousand roses...but due to a whole series of misadventures it also makes all the Smurfs cry, moved to tears by the slightest of pretexts. While they sob, bawl, wail moan and whimper, the evil wizard Gargamel does not stand still...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil Maestro's magical paints have the power to transport his models onto canvas – forever! Papa Smurf directs Painter to switch his paints and before long, Maestro is enshrined in a picture next to his dream girl, Smurfette.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf organizes a crew to sail to Smurfberry Island because Gargamel has killed all of the trees except one to trap the Smurfs. Gargamel follows them, but once more fails to catch them because the Witch of Smurfberry Island sends her nose-eating seagulls after them.

programme.title: The Abominable Snowbeast
programme.desc: Brainy and his friends organize a journey to Ice Mountain to pick the rare snow flower for Papa Smurf. They meet a terrifying snow beast that befriends them, due to Smurfette's kindness, and helps them find the tiny flower.

programme.title: The Masked Pie-Smurfer
programme.desc: When tempers flare, the Smurfs hire a masked pie thrower to get revenge on other Smurfs. Everyone becomes even angrier as pies fly and no one knows who's doing it. When Jokey is unmasked as the culprit, Papa defends him. He says that if all the Smurfs shared their feelings, they wouldn't need a secret pie thrower.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel pours a glue-like potion on Clumsy and when anyone touches him, they become stuck to him. The Smurfs become linked to each other until Papa grabs Gargamel's nose. Gargamel, who is annoyed at having all the Smurfs stuck to him, devises a counter-potion and the Smurfs are free once more.

programme.title: A Bell For Azrael
programme.desc: Gargamel puts a spell on a bell attached to Azrael's tail that will lead the cat to the Smurfs. Papa Smurf outwits him with a counter-spell that leads the wizard to Big Mouth instead of the tasty Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel asks the sorcerer Balthazar for a recipe to capture the Smurfs. It involves kidnapping Mother Nature to stop the arrival of Spring. Luckily, the Smurfs save the day.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs learn that the mind is more powerful than matter when they are fooled by a quack's outrageously expensive miracle tonic. But Papa Smurf cures the Smurfs of their temporary naiveté and the charlatan of his villainy.

programme.title: The Great Lime Crop Failure
programme.desc: Bullrush the Wartmonger is in a panic because the lime harvest has failed. So he captures Farmer Smurf, the world’s greatest agricultural expert, to solve his problems. Farmer Smurf installs an irrigation system and saves the harvest. He then escapes in a bubble and returns to the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hefty dresses like Smurfette to lure an enamored gnome, Piltkin, away from the Smurf Village. They burrow underground and meet a female gnome who falls in love with Piltkin who then casts Smurfette aside for his new heartthrob.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Grouchy learns that emotions can be great, particularly after the villainess of Chlorhydris creates a heart of ice to magically drain every one of care and love.

programme.title: Wedding Bells For Gargamel
programme.desc: The Smurfs befriend a maiden in distress who is betrothed to Gargamel by convincing her father that the foolish wizard is insane.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A swamp monster kidnaps Baby as a gift for a witch. The witch, who thinks no one loves her, is amazed when Baby shows affection. When Papa comes to rescue Baby, he makes the witch understand that the loyal swamp monster has always loved her.

programme.title: Educating Bigmouth
programme.desc: The Smurfs try to teach Bigmouth about romance, manners, and getting a job after Bignose kicks him out. He returns to her refined, but Bigteeth is courting Bignose. Bignose realizes what she was missing and takes Bigmouth back to live happily ever after.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A wicked sorceress casts a spell on the Smurfs, forcing them to love themselves and not each other. Vanity, who's always like that, was away at the time, but notices the change when he returns. He breaks the spell by getting all the Smurfs to eat humble pie baked by a wizard.

programme.title: Can't Smurf The Music
programme.desc: There is nothing the sorceress Chlorhydris hates so much as love in the world. She would like to see all love banished from the face of the Earth, and she's going to start with music. She puts a spell on a magic horn so that it will suck the music out of every song... especially the Smurfs' songs. Helped by their friend Laconia, the Smurfs may be able to resist Chlorhydris' evil plan...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy learns it’s better to have smurfed than not to have smurfed at all when he learns his true love is really a mermaid. Can they really live with each other forever?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Little Orange Horse With Gold Shoes
programme.desc: Sliding down a rainbow, a little winged horse loses a golden shoe. He meets the Smurfette and she helps him look for his lost horseshoe. They fall in love somehow, for who could be unmoved by the charm of a little orange horse... Or of a Smurfette?

programme.title: To Smurf A Thief
programme.desc: The Smurfs and Homnibus befriend an unfortunate boy who is forced to steal for his master. Soon, the evil thief is turned over to the magistrate and the boy is happy to live with Homnibus.

programme.title: The Colour Smurf
programme.desc: Spectra is the Colour Fairy, the one whose wheel of colours make all the blues, reds, yellows and greens of the world. She is a friend of Painter Smurf, so when he takes the Smurflings to her home in her absence, the Smurflings fool around with the Colour Wheel... and all the colours disappear from the Earth. What's worse, without colours the Colour Fairy cannot live...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: If there is one thing that the evil sorceress Chlorhydris cannot abide, it is other people's happiness. The spectacle of the Smurfs' gentle and song-filled life gets Chlorhydsis' hackles up. She must destroy that tinkling laughter, smother those happy repartees... She plants the root of evil in the forest and soon, no Smurf is on speaking terms with another. Baby Smurf is the only one untouched...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Baby Smurf has lost all interest in toys. Even Jokey's surprises fail to amuse the tiny tyke. Grandpa Smurf suggests they go and pay a visit to the Toymaker, the one who makes toys for children all over the world. Or rather used to make: the Toymaker is tired of the lack of appreciation his toys receive from those who receive them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: There is a prize for the cutest pet of a Smurf. Baby Smurf brings a cute, lovely, affectionate Glowing Darling, a pet anybody falls in love with… But this pet is a creation of Gargamel, the evil wizard intent on destroying the Smurfs!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In another Smurf theatrical super-production based – very loosely – on Alexandre Dumas' characters, a masterpiece of the stage is created, with a few lines from Romeo and Juliet thrown in.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs discover the spirit and joy of friendly competition when they hold their first "Smurfic Games". After a near miss with the troublesome cat Azrael, the Smurfs decide they need to get into better shape. Papa Smurf suggests that the Smurfs tone their bodies as well as sharpen their athletic abilities by inaugurating the "Smurfic Games".

programme.title: The Great Lime Crop Failure
programme.desc: Bullrush the Wartmonger is in a panic because the lime harvest has failed. So he captures Farmer Smurf, the world’s greatest agricultural expert, to solve his problems. Farmer Smurf installs an irrigation system and saves the harvest. He then escapes in a bubble and returns to the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Lazy dreams he is on Paradise Island and free from all the work Papa Smurf inflicts on him. His fantasy turns into a nightmare that sends him eagerly back to work once more.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hogatha, the repulsive witch, captures the Smurfette. She wants to steal from the little blue beauty her golden hair. Can the Smurfs save their little female companion before it is too late? Can Hogatha grow hair like Smurfette's?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel pours a glue-like potion on Clumsy and when anyone touches him, they become stuck to him. The Smurfs become linked to each other until Papa grabs Gargamel's nose. Gargamel, who is annoyed at having all the Smurfs stuck to him, devises a counter-potion and the Smurfs are free once more.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs learn that the mind is more powerful than matter when they are fooled by a quack's outrageously expensive miracle tonic. But Papa Smurf cures the Smurfs of their temporary naiveté and the charlatan of his villainy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs discover a fountain of youth that is guarded by a wicked troll, who steals Papa Smurf's magic book. They convince Gargamel to help them and the greedy villain runs to get the water, but manages to fall in with the troll. As the two chase each other all over the countryside, the Smurfs are able to retrieve Papa Smurf's book.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: While out on a mischief-making mission to destroy the Smurfs' Happy Halloween party, Gargamel and Hogatha catch Lazy who has been accidentally turned red by Mother Nature. Papa and the Smurfs help Lazy escape while Mother Nature has Father Time help turn Lazy's red into blue just in time for the Halloween party.

programme.title: The Abominable Snowbeast
programme.desc: Brainy and his friends organize a journey to Ice Mountain to pick the rare snow flower for Papa Smurf. They meet a terrifying snow beast that befriends them, due to Smurfette's kindness, and helps them find the tiny flower.

programme.title: Heavenly Smurfs
programme.desc: Once again, Gargamel's infallible plan to catch the Smurfs has been foiled. But the Smurfs play a trick on him: disguised as tiny blue angels, they will teach him to mend his ways...

programme.title: The Mr Smurf Contest
programme.desc: When Papa decides to throw a Harvest Moon ball, all the male Smurfs compete in a "Mr Smurf" contest for the honor of escorting Sassette. Gargamel sneaks into the contest after shrinking himself with blue dye, in the hope of capturing all the Smurfs when he returns to normal size. The Smurfs kick him out and Sassette lets Papa escort her.

programme.title: Essence Of Brainy
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf is not the same anymore. He is polite, considerate, modest and calls every other Smurf Sir or Madame. All the Smurfs are worried that Brainy has lost all that makes his personality. They ought to be worried, for Brainy has been the victim of a system called an Essence Remover that Scruple, Gargamel's apprentice, uses... But Brainy's essence is coming back!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: Smurfing In Sign Language
programme.desc: The Smurfs meet a woodland elf, who teaches them sign language after Gargamel inflicts a no-speaking potion on them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Trying a new spell on the Smurfs backfires when Gargamel turns himself into stone. The Smurfs are delirious with joy. Their archenemy will make them suffer no more!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Bigmouth steals the Smurfs' winter food supply and Brainy concocts one of Papa Smurf's magic strength potions so he can fight the greedy giant. The super formula wears off, but Papa Smurf works a fast switch, replacing the food with rocks and Bigmouth is none the wiser.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel asks the sorcerer Balthazar for a recipe to capture the Smurfs. It involves kidnapping Mother Nature to stop the arrival of Spring. Luckily, the Smurfs save the day.

programme.title: Can't Smurf The Music
programme.desc: There is nothing the sorceress Chlorhydris hates so much as love in the world. She would like to see all love banished from the face of the Earth, and she's going to start with music. She puts a spell on a magic horn so that it will suck the music out of every song... especially the Smurfs' songs. Helped by their friend Laconia, the Smurfs may be able to resist Chlorhydris' evil plan...

programme.title: Secret Of The Village Well
programme.desc: Why is Clumsy Smurf waiting day and night near the Village well? What is the wish that he wants to be kept secret? How is Gargamel going to be mixed up in this mysterious affair? Is Gargamel going to catch the Smurfs at last?

programme.title: Speak For Yourself, Farmer Smurf
programme.desc: Farmer hides his love for Smurfette by assuming a disguise and sending her poems. When they finally meet, they are captured by Bigmouth and in their struggle to get free, they discover their mutual friendship.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Accidents do happen. This time it is Jokey Smurf's mistake that ends up with his shadow coming to independent life! And the shadow loves to play practical jokes on the whole population of the Village of the Smurfs...

programme.title: Peligro En La Aldea
programme.desc: El pérfido mago Gargamel está harto de la constante superioridad de los Pitufos. Decide destruir su aldea de una vez por todas. Con ese fin, entrena una termita para que destroce, demuela, devaste y destruya todas las casas que se encuentre en su camino. Sin embargo, los efectos son mucho peores de lo que Gargamel había imaginado, ya que los Pitufos creen que las travesuras de los Pitufitos son las que están destruyendo su aldea.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Bebé Pitufo ha perdido el interés por los juguetes. Ni siquiera las sorpresas de Pitufo Bromista consiguen entretener al pequeño. Abuelo Pitufo propone hacer una visita al Juguetero, el encargado de fabricar juguetes para los niños de todo el mundo. O más bien, el que los fabricaba: el Juguetero está cansado del poco aprecio que demuestran por sus juguetes aquellos que los reciben.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Fortachón descubre a un caballero que lo ayuda a combatir a un Dragón, pero éste huye y deja a Fortachón defendiendo a los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Soñador verá cumplido su deseo de ser un Astropitufo cuando Papá Pitufo le hechiza para quedarse dormido, transformando el paisaje y a los Pitufos en una fantasía galáctica. Gargamel vigila de cerca las travesuras de los Pitufos desde su bola de cristal, pero el hechizo de Papá Pitufo también tiene efecto en él y le transporta hasta el centro de una tormenta.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Práctico aprende que es mejor haber pitufado que no haber pitufado nunca cuando descubre que su amor verdadero es una sirena. ¿Podrán vivir juntos para siempre?

programme.title: Los Amigos De Soñador
programme.desc: Cuando Pitufo Soñador decide visitar a sus amigos, los Tufos, Papá Pitufo crea una poción para transformar a los Pitufos en criaturas de aspecto alienígena. Sin embargo, los efectos de la poción desaparecen demasiado pronto y Pitufo Soñador tiene que enfrentarse a la realidad de que los Tufos no existen. Está triste hasta que llega un alienígena de verdad para devolver a Pitufo Soñador su carta, ya que la recibió por error.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En su búsqueda de algo novedoso, Pitufo Vanidoso se pone un sombrero mágico creado por Gargamel que le deja la cara hecha un adefesio. Mediante una argucia, Papá Pitufo consigue robarle el antídoto al malvado mago, logrando así que Pitufo Vanidoso recupere su belleza.

programme.title: El Amigo Más Pitufo
programme.desc: Pitufo Filósofo tenía un amigo: Pitufo Torpe. Pero el pobre Pitufo Torpe es tan… bueno, torpe, que Pitufo Filósofo no quiere volverle a ver. Así que ahora no queda nadie dispuesto a escucharle. Quizá Buddy, el apuesto diablillo que ha conocido por casualidad cerca del gran roble, pueda convertirse en amigo de Pitufo Filósofo…

programme.title: La Absopitufiasombrosa Máquina
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio inventa una máquina que hará que los Pitufos controlen el clima a su voluntad.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El chico del bosque y Laconia, la elfa muda y sorda, preguntan a Papá Pitufo que celebre su boda. Mientras los Pitufos preparan la fiesta bajo las órdenes de Pitufina, Gargamel hace acto de presencia.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Papá Pitufo se encuentra indefenso cuando se le acaban las bayas mágicas que utiliza para sus pociones. Afortunadamente, los pequeños Pitufos encuentran un bebé de dragón en el bosque y con su ayuda…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado hechicero Gargamel acude una vez más a Esmeralda, la adivinadora, la cual se las ingenia para hacerse con el dinero de Gargamel. Cuando es el turno de los Pitufos, les hace creer que existe un árbol de la suerte…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos hambrientos descubren una cueva en donde se encuentra oculta comida congelada custodiada por un trol también congelado quien fue encarcelado debido a su avaricia por un diamante mágico. Mientras los Pitufos descongelan la cueva Gargamel roba la comida, pero el diamante mágico lo transforma en una masa helada y el trol liberado ayuda gustosamente a los Pitufos a cargar la comida de regreso a su aldea.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Carpintero ha tenido una nueva y revolucionaria idea: una especie de carro que se mueve sobre raíles y no requiere que los Pitufos tiren de él. Lo llama pitufitren y hace que la vida en la aldea resulte menos cansada… hasta que Gargamel lo descubre.

programme.title: Pitufo Sabelotodo
programme.desc: Nadie escucha nunca los consejos de Pitufo Filósofo, así que, cuando Papá Pitufo se va de viaje y Pitufo Filósofo cree estar al mando, decide que va a ser el que tenga todas las respuestas. El libro de hechizos de Papá Pitufo contiene una fórmula mágica para garantizar que todos los habitantes de la Aldea Pitufa acudan a Pitufo Filósofo para pedirle su opinión. Y, por si las cosas no fueran lo suficientemente complicadas, aquí llega Gargamel…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La nueva obra de Pitufo Poeta va a ser su mayor creación de todos los tiempos, y contará con Pitufina, la preferida de todos, como actriz principal. Los demás Pitufos compiten por el honor de actuar junto a Pitufina. Incluso Pitufo Tímido, que es muy discreto y retraído, es uno de los candidatos al papel. Pero Pitufo Filósofo, que se ha autodesignado director de la obra, no lo ve de la misma manera…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Pitufo Que Queria Ser Rey
programme.desc: Pitufo Soñador anhela convertirse en rey después de leer una historia sobre reyes. Mientras está en su barco, cae a través de un remolino y llega a una tierra de pequeños seres que creen que Pitufo Soñador es su rey, desaparecido hace mucho tiempo. Cuando se enfrenta a los Norfnangs, los enemigos de esos pequeños seres, descubre que no son terroríficos en absoluto. Pitufo Soñador se da un golpe en la cabeza y descubre al despertar que todo había sido un sueño, aunque encuentra en su gorro una joya idéntica a las que extraían esos pequeños seres de su mina.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filósofo está horrorizado. Sasita no sabe leer, por lo que podría estar condenada a perderse las perlas de sabiduría que contiene su libro «Citas de Pitufo Filósofo». Así pues, intenta enseñarla a leer. Sin embargo, resulta que casi lo primero que puede leer es una fórmula para hacer que todos los libros desaparezcan. Todos los libros del mundo, ¡incluidos el libro de hechizos de Gargamel y los libros de remedios de Ómnibus!

programme.title: Fortachón Y Pitufina
programme.desc: Pitufo Fortachón descubre lo que es estar incapacitado cuando se rompe la pierna. Pitufo Carpintero crea para él una pitufisilla de ruedas, un invento que le proporcionará algo de movilidad a Pitufo Fortachón. Pero, de repente, el malvado mago Gargamel aparece en escena.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Bebé Pitufo ha perdido el interés por los juguetes. Ni siquiera las sorpresas de Pitufo Bromista consiguen entretener al pequeño. Abuelo Pitufo propone hacer una visita al Juguetero, el encargado de fabricar juguetes para los niños de todo el mundo. O más bien, el que los fabricaba: el Juguetero está cansado del poco aprecio que demuestran por sus juguetes aquellos que los reciben.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Mientras los pitufos construyen cápsulas del tiempo para guardar sus talentos, Papá Pitufo está tratando desesperadamente de acertar un acertijo druídico antes de que un gran desastre llegue al bosque.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado primo del Rey, Malcolm, lo ha convertido en un ciervo negro para poder acabar con él y ponerle en su sala de trofeos. Los Pitufos irán a ayudar a su amigo y, tras devolver al Rey a su verdadera forma, Malcom acabará preso dentro del cuerpo del ciervo negro.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Las pinturas del malvado Maestro son capaces de tele portar a sus modelos dentro del cuadro…para siempre! Papá pitufo le dice a Pintor que cambie las pinturas y en poco tiempo Maestro acaba dentro de uno de sus cuadros, al lado de su modelo de ensueño: Pitufina.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: No es culpa suya. Pitufo Torpe nunca deja de provocar catástrofes, e incluso cuando Papá Pitufo le manda al bosque a hacer un recado, vuelve acompañado de una nube de mala suerte cuya sombra causa infortunios a cualquiera (o a cualquier Pitufo) que esté bajo ella… Papá Pitufo tendrá que echar mano de todos sus recursos para encontrar una cura ¡y encontrar la cara brillante que cada nube oscura debería tener!

programme.title: El Pitufo Galante
programme.desc: La reina Agripina no dejará que su hijo, el príncipe Godofredo, se case con la dulce Priscila. Ella quiere como nuera a una chica que sea capaz de mostrarle algo que nunca antes haya visto. Cuando Hogata se entera y descubre la existencia de Abuelo Pitufo, está segura de que logrará sorprender a la reina con su captura. Por supuesto, Hogata debe atrapar primero a Abuelo Pitufo…

programme.title: Los Pitufos Y El Árbol Del Dinero
programme.desc: El mago malvado Gargamel ha elaborado otro plan diabólico con la ayuda de su madre, quien no es más agradable que él. Él quiere persuadir a los Pitufos con dinero pero ellos no saben lo que les espera. ¿Pitufo Goloso caerá en la trampa?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hogata consigue los pendientes dorados mágicos de Sonoria, que le permitirán oír las voces de los Pitufos desde lejos. Siguiendo los ronquidos de Pitufo Perezoso, está a punto de llegar hasta la Aldea Pitufa, pero entonces los sonidos del cuerno de Pitufo Armonía comienzan a resonar en sus pendientes y huye enfurecida de vuelta a casa.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Viaje Al Pitufo De La Tierra
programme.desc: El invierno ha llegado a la Aldea Pitufa. Y los pequeños Pitufos están helados de frío. ¿Pero qué está haciendo Pitufo Torpe con esa extraña roca que ha descubierto? ¿Y por qué está tan entusiasmado Pitufo Minero con su nuevo descubrimiento? Nadie entiende a qué se debe tanto revuelo por una simple nueva roca para la colección de Pitufo Torpe… Al adentrarse bajo tierra, los Pitufos encontrarán peligros y sorpresas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El pantano de Greenpeedeepee es el único lugar donde se pueden encontrar unas algas que son el delicioso e imprescindible ingrediente del famoso estofado de algas de Pitufo Goloso. Desafortunadamente, también es un lugar donde te puedes topar con los desagradables Verrugosos. A pesar de que Sasita y los Pitufos le salvan la vida a un joven Verrugoso, acaban siendo apresados por los demás. ¡Pero el Enmascarado Escarlata los salvará! Quizá…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Habia Una Vez Una Luna Azul
programme.desc: Una noche de Luna Azulada, tal y como la leyenda decía, un bebé pitufo aparece en el pueblo, y todos acaban cogiéndole cariño. Pero todo ha sido un malentendido y la cigüeña vuelve a por el bebé. Pintor y Gruñón se han encariñado tanto con el bebé que la acaban devolviéndoles el bebé.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Caballo Anaranjado De Los Zapatos De Oro
programme.desc: Deslizándose por un arcoíris, un caballito alado pierde una herradura dorada. Tras encontrarse con Pitufina, ambos van en su búsqueda. Al final, acaban encariñándose ya que quién podría resistirse al encanto de un caballito alado…o de Pitufina?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Para tratar de descubrir dónde se encuentra el escondite secreto de diamantes de los Pitufos, Gargamel finge ser su amigo. Cuando muestra su verdadera naturaleza malvada, Papá Pitufo conjura un hechizo mágico para salvar a sus pequeños Pitufos de las garras maliciosas del mago malvado.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La repulsiva bruja Hogata captura a Pitufina. Quiere robarle a la pequeña belleza azul su cabello dorado. ¿Conseguirán salvar los Pitufos a su pequeña compañera antes de que sea demasiado tarde? ¿Logrará Hogata una cabellera como la de Pitufina?

programme.title: Los Pitufos Monstruosos
programme.desc: Es la noche de los fantasmas y todos los Pitufos se preparan para la elegante fiesta de disfraces… pero Pitufo Filósofo se hace con el libro de magia de Papá Pitufo y todos los Pitufos se transforman en criaturas horrendas, aunque divertidas. No obstante, el peligro acecha…

programme.title: La Carrera De Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Carpintero ha ideado un nuevo invento: el pitufimóvil. Todos los Pitufos tienen su propio vehículo personalizado y todos (o casi todos) disfrutan dando una vuelta en ellos. Sin embargo, el malvado mago Gargamel se aprovecha de la idea y empieza a causar problemas a los Pitufos…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hay algún tipo de poder maligno en la corona del Titan que Minero encuentra bajo tierra, y Avaricioso acaba sucumbiendo a él. Cuando Gargamel aparece con una de sus fechorías en mente, todo se acaba enrevesándose.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Papá Pitufo organiza un grupo para navegar a una lejana isla ya que Gargamel ha cortado todos los árboles menos uno para atrapar a los pitufos. Gargamel les sigue pero la Bruja de la isla acaba enviando sus gaviotas tras él.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La nota que Papá Pitufo escribió avisando a los demás Pitufos para que vean un cometa está rota. Al ser sólo capaces de leer una parte, los Pitufos creen que es el fin del mundo. Todos planean cómo será su último día, hasta que papá Pitufo regresa y clarifica el lío.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Cama Voladora De Papa Pitufo
programme.desc: Gargamel lanza un hechizo a la nueva cama de Papá Pitufo para que cualquiera que duerma en ella sea transportado al lugar con el que esté soñando. Los ensueños de los Pitufos les llevan a un barco, un castillo y, por último, hasta Gargamel. Consiguen escapar cuando Pitufo Torpe se queda dormido y sueña con su hogar.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel roba el reloj de arena de Padre Tiempo con la intención de viajar al pasado y destruir a los Pitufos, a quienes culpa de que su vida sea un fracaso. Sus planes se ven frustrados cuando aparece Gigantón y rompe el hechizo, que solo duraría mientras nadie viera a Gargamel.

programme.title: El Pitufo Osado
programme.desc: Esta vez, Gargamel tiene un plan infalible. Sin hacer caso de la risa burlona de Azrael, el malvado hechicero ha perfeccionado una sustancia mágica a la que ha llamado «polvo temerario», que convertirá a todos los Pitufos en temerarios e intrépidos aventureros. ¿Caerá Papá Pitufo en la trampa de Gargamel? ¿Atrapará su enemigo a todos los Pitufos? ¿Tendrá esta historia un final feliz?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Pitufo Que Queria Ser Rey
programme.desc: Pitufo Soñador anhela convertirse en rey después de leer una historia sobre reyes. Mientras está en su barco, cae a través de un remolino y llega a una tierra de pequeños seres que creen que Pitufo Soñador es su rey, desaparecido hace mucho tiempo. Cuando se enfrenta a los Norfnangs, los enemigos de esos pequeños seres, descubre que no son terroríficos en absoluto. Pitufo Soñador se da un golpe en la cabeza y descubre al despertar que todo había sido un sueño, aunque encuentra en su gorro una joya idéntica a las que extraían esos pequeños seres de su mina.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: No todos los días se encuentra uno con una flor parlante. Y, en especial, con un personaje como Petaluma, una planta bulbosa algo arrogante con la que Pitufina se encuentra en el bosque. Por supuesto, Pitufina se muestra encantada y lleva a Petaluma con ella a la Aldea Pitufa… desencadenando un proceso que pondrá en peligro a todos los Pitufos. Parece que las flores están hechas para contemplarlas y no para escucharlas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La vida en la Aldea Pitufa podría ser más tranquila si Puppy se comportara un poco mejor. Sin embargo, el pequeño perro de los Pitufos se dedica a escarbar entre las flores de Pitufina, ensuciar el nuevo papel pintado de Pitufo Vanidoso y arruinar los experimentos de Papá Pitufo. Aun así, Puppy va a ayudar a los Pitufos a escapar de una trampa que les ha tendido Gargamel. O quizá no tenga la disciplina necesaria para ello…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Un hechizo ha alterado las cajas sorpresa explosivas de Pitufo Bromista. Imagina la cara de desconcierto que se le queda a este guasón cuando se da cuenta de que todas las sorpresas que entrega a otros incautos Pitufos en realidad contienen regalos. ¡Se acabaron las explosiones, las bromas y la diversión! Y a eso se le une su poco envidiable posición como el Pitufo más popular de la aldea, rodeado de admiradores que no cesan de pedirle más obsequios…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos sabemos que Pitufo Gruñón odia varias cosas. Pero la cosa que odia más que nada es el agua, cuando hay suficiente para que se pueda ahogar. Pitufo Gruñón no sabe nadar. Y cuando los Pitufos notan esto y le tratan de enseñar cómo sobrevivir en el agua, el malvado mago Gargamel hace que todo sea un poco más peligroso de lo que debería ser...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Te despiertas temprano por la mañana, antes de que los demás Pitufos se hayan levantado de sus camas, para preparar sabrosos bizcochos de pitufrutas. Dedicas toda la mañana a preparar pitufimanjares para el almuerzo. Después, toda la tarde a tener la deliciosa cena lista a tiempo. ¿Y acaso los demás Pitufos te dan siquiera las gracias? Así pues, Pitufo Goloso renuncia. La aldea está en problemas… y pronto, también lo está Pitufo Goloso.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio ha decidido dedicarse al bienestar de los demás Pitufos. Va a curarles de todos sus males…con la ayuda del malvado Gargamel!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Es cierto: lo bueno en exceso puede ser malo. Cuando se produce un accidente que afecta a la fórmula mágica de Papá Pitufo y este acaba duplicado, los Pitufos se muestran encantados: dos Papás Pitufo pueden dar el doble de buenos consejos y el doble de amor que uno solo. Sin embargo, después de un tiempo, las cosas se complican en exceso en la aldea. ¡Sobre todo cuando otro accidente hace que Gargamel también se duplique!

programme.title: Dilo Por Ti Mismo, Granjero
programme.desc: Pitufo Labrador esconde su amor por Pitufina ocultándose en el anonimato y enviándole poemas. Cuando finalmente se encuentran, Gigantón les captura y, en sus esfuerzos por escapar, descubren su afecto mutuo.

programme.title: Pitufo Sobre Ruedas
programme.desc: Cada año, todos los Pitufos recorren la larga senda hasta llegar a unos manantiales termales de ensueño. Sin embargo, este año únicamente Abuelo Pitufo, Papá Pitufo y Pitufo Natural harán la caminata hasta ese lugar. Los demás Pitufos están demasiado atareados (o son demasiado vagos) como para caminar. Entonces, Pitufo Carpintero llega con lo que él llama su pitufurgón personalizado. Ya no es necesario andar: basta con ir sobre ruedas hasta allí… Por supuesto, las cosas no serán tan sencillas como parecen.

programme.title: El Regreso De Don Pitufo
programme.desc: Cuando una gota de la nueva poción de Papá Pitufo cae en el libro de aventuras de los Pitufitos, el héroe de ficción cobra vida. El intrépido Don Pitufo, que desea deshacer a los Pitufos del malvado Gargamel, lo captura con valentía…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel vuelve a estar en problemas. Si no puede reunir una enorme cantidad de oro para el atardecer, le arrebatarán todas sus posesiones. Sin embargo, los Pitufos van a ayudar a su archienemigo… hasta cierto punto.

programme.title: El Genio De Granjero
programme.desc: Pitufo Labrador se pregunta qué hace una calabaza en el melonar, cuando debería estar junto a los colinabos. Cuando Pitufo Labrador tira de la calabaza y la separa del suelo, libera a un genio que comienza a llamarle amo e insiste en concederle deseos. El ansia del genio, llamado Gourdy, por complacer a Pitufo Labrador hará que, más que en una ayuda, se convierta en una molestia.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Patoso y sus desventuras le llevan a través de un río a un lugar desconocido. Allí conoce a las duendecillas, unas adorables criaturitas cuyos enemigos acabarán encontrándose con los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio inventa a Pituforobotín para que ayude a todos los Pitufos en sus labores, pero Filósofo lo reprograma para que abandone la Aldea Pitufo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos aman las trufas y las trufas son de los Trolls. No será nada fácil que los pitufitos azules tengan un banquete.

programme.title: Don Pituzorro
programme.desc: Todo el mundo tiene sus propios sueños. El de Pitufina es conocer al legendario Don Pituzorro, el gallardo, ingenioso e intrépido héroe de numerosas y cautivadoras aventuras. Los Pitufos no toman en serio ese encaprichamiento. Sin embargo, cuando un Don Pituzorro real aparece en la aldea y Pitufina les ignora en favor del jactancioso extraño, se toman el asunto algo más en serio.

programme.title: El Concurso De Mr. Pitufo
programme.desc: Papá Pitufo decide celebrar una fiesta de la cosecha, y todos los Pitufos compiten en el concurso de «Mr. Pitufo» por el honor de ser el acompañante de Sasita. Gargamel se cuela en el concurso después de encoger su cuerpo con un tinte azul mágico, con la esperanza de capturar a todos los Pitufos cuando vuelva a su tamaño normal. Los Pitufos le echan y Sasita decide que Papá Pitufo será su acompañante.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En su búsqueda de algo novedoso, Pitufo Vanidoso se pone un sombrero mágico creado por Gargamel que le deja la cara hecha un adefesio. Mediante una argucia, Papá Pitufo consigue robarle el antídoto al malvado mago, logrando así que Pitufo Vanidoso recupere su belleza.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Una Fiesta De Pijamas Para Perezoso
programme.desc: ¡Pobre Pitufo Perezoso! Todo lo que desea es una buena noche de descanso. Pero no: todos los Pitufos celebran una fiesta en su honor y, lo que es peor, se ve arrastrado a una absurda discusión sobre pintar los dedos de los pies de Gigantón de un brillante color mandarina. ¡Va a ser una larga noche en vela para el pobre Pitufo Perezoso!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio inventa a Pituforobotín para que ayude a todos los Pitufos en sus labores, pero Filósofo lo reprograma para que abandone la Aldea Pitufo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Mientras los pitufos construyen cápsulas del tiempo para guardar sus talentos, Papá Pitufo está tratando desesperadamente de acertar un acertijo druídico antes de que un gran desastre llegue al bosque.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Simón se ha perdido en el bosque buscando a sus padres, una pareja de gigantes. Los Pitufos tratarán de llevarlo de vuelta a su casa, pero gargamel aparecerá una vez más con no muy buenas intenciones.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufina ha encontrado a una nueva amiga, Laura, una niña de seis años de edad cuyos padres viven cerca del bosque. Juntas, las dos niñas se pasean por el bosque. Pero una vieja bruja que vive en el bosque las captura.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos pueden cometer errores. Incluso Papá Pitufo. Su nuevo pulverizador para potenciar el perfume hace que una rosa huela como un millar de ellas… pero, debido a una serie de desafortunados sucesos, también hace llorar a todos los Pitufos, que se deshacen en lágrimas a la mínima. Mientras sollozan, berrean, se lamentan, gimen y lloriquean, el malvado mago Gargamel pasa a la acción…

programme.title: Ahora Los Pitufeas Y Ahora No
programme.desc: Los troles subterráneos capturan a los Pitufos para que sean sus esclavos. Papá Pitufo ingeniosamente los libera y luego destruye la bola de cristal mágica que les concede el poder sobre los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos deben encontrar a una familia de conejos para tirar de su carroza durante el Festival de Otoño. Gargamel ve la oportunidad de capturar a los pequeños seres azules y se disfraza de conejo gigante. ¿Conseguirá atrapar a todos los Pitufos de un plumazo?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos hambrientos descubren una cueva en donde se encuentra oculta comida congelada custodiada por un trol también congelado quien fue encarcelado debido a su avaricia por un diamante mágico. Mientras los Pitufos descongelan la cueva Gargamel roba la comida, pero el diamante mágico lo transforma en una masa helada y el trol liberado ayuda gustosamente a los Pitufos a cargar la comida de regreso a su aldea.

programme.title: La Absopitufiasombrosa Máquina
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio inventa una máquina que hará que los Pitufos controlen el clima a su voluntad.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Goloso Y La Olla De Estofado
programme.desc: El hada buena Guinilda entrega a Pitufo Goloso una olla mágica, pero Pitufo Filósofo hace que se desborde e inunde la aldea y el bosque. La bienintencionada hada acude al rescate y pide que le devuelvan la olla para dársela a un orfanato de niños hambrientos.

programme.title: Cosas Que Putifan En La Noche
programme.desc: Cuando Pitufo Colérico pierde a su oso de peluche Huggy, no consigue dormir a pesar de los esfuerzos de Papá Pitufo por convencerle de que los osos de peluche son mágicos y pueden cuidar de sí mismos. Gargamel se tropieza con la Aldea Pitufa y Huggy regresa convertido en un oso gigante para espantar y salvar a Pitufo Colérico.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Papá Pitufo recuerda las emocionantes aventuras de Soñador en el mar, con tortugas, ballenas, islas desiertas…y piratas!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos aman las trufas y las trufas son de los Trolls. No será nada fácil que los pitufitos azules tengan un banquete.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Durante una misión para interrumpir la fiesta de Halloween de los Pitufos, Gargamel y Hogatha consiguen capturar a Perezoso, el cual se ha vuelto rojo por un extraño capricho de la naturaleza. Papá Pitufo y los demás conseguirán liberar a Perezoso, y la Madre Naturaleza devolverá su color al pitufo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Esta vez, Gargamel se siente seguro de sí mismo. Bueno, casi… ¡Está a punto de atrapar a los pequeños Pitufos! Las ligerísimas tortitas de Pitufo Goloso casi provocan que los Pitufos floten hasta quedar al alcance de Gargamel.

programme.title: El Amo Escrúpulo
programme.desc: Pitufo Labrador es el reticente amo de un genio llamado Gourdy, cuyo entusiasmo por ser servicial es quizá algo excesivo. Tras un nuevo incidente provocado por el exceso de celo de Gourdy, Pitufo Labrador le dice algo que no debería haber dicho y Gourdy desaparece. ¿Y a que no adivinas quién lo encuentra? En efecto: Escrupuloso, el aprendiz del malvado mago Gargamel. ¿Y quién podría arrebatar a Gourdy de las manos de Escrupuloso, sino el propio Gargamel?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos los Pitufos quieren un poema escrito para cada uno de ellos. Pitufo Poeta se siente superado por la presión y decide huir en busca de inspiración. El rey Fiera Bestia captura a Pitufo Poeta y lo obliga a escribir un poema para animar a su hija. Pitufo Poeta descubre que la motivación debe nacer del corazón, y nunca de la obligación.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Indeciso, tal como su nombre indica, no consigue decidirse sobre nada. Los otros Pitufos le llevan al bosque para hacer una prueba de supervivencia en la que únicamente pueda encontrar el camino de vuelta a casa tomando decisiones. Sin embargo, acaba en el castillo de Baltasar.

programme.desc: Prepárese para ver algunos videoclips histéricos y trepidantes enviados por espectadores que comparten los momentos más divertidos de sus mascotas y personas favoritas.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! Follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game: 'Duel Monsters.'

programme.title: Roblox DOORS with Thinknoodles!
programme.desc: Thinknoodles plays Roblox Doors horror game in ROBLOX!

programme.title: Super Mario RPG
programme.desc: Enter a world of whimsy with Mario on a quest to repair Star Road and defeat the troublemaking Smithy Gang, who has crashed into their world and scattered the 7 Star Pieces of Star Road. Abdallah plays as Mario and teams up with a party of unlikely allies, like the monstrous Bowser and a mysterious doll named Geno, in Super Mario RPG on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic X
programme.desc: A slight malfunction causes Chaos Control, and sends Sonic the Hedgehog to Earth. While there, Sonic meets Chris Thorndyke, who helps in collecting the Chaos Emeralds, so Sonic and friends can go home.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder
programme.desc: Mario and friends are invited to the Flower Kingdom by its ruler, Prince Florian, when Bowser suddenly appears, along with Kamek and Bowser Jr.! Bowser then takes hold of the Wonder Flower, merging himself, his Koopa Clown Car, and Prince Florian's castle to become a flying fortress, wreaking havoc across the land and trapping the Poplins in their homes. Abdallah plays as Mario and friends and sets off on a journey to defeat Bowser and save the Flower Kingdom in Super Mario Bros. Wonder on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic Superstars
programme.desc: Adventure through the mystical Northstar Islands and harness all-new Emerald powers to move and attack in dynamic new ways. Navigate gorgeous, never-before-seen environments and stop Dr. Eggman, Fang, and a mysterious new adversary from converting the islands' giant animals into Badniks before it's too late! Watch as Abdallah plays as Sonic and friends in Sonic Superstars on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Princess Peach: Showtime!
programme.desc: Princess Peach sets off to save the Sparkle Theater from Grape and the Sour Bunch. The guardian fairy of the Sparkle Theater, Stella, assists Peach by giving her usage of Sparkle power and allowing her to transform. Abdallah plays as Princess Peach in Princess Peach: Showtime! on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Super Mario RPG
programme.desc: Enter a world of whimsy with Mario on a quest to repair Star Road and defeat the troublemaking Smithy Gang, who has crashed into their world and scattered the 7 Star Pieces of Star Road. Abdallah plays as Mario and teams up with a party of unlikely allies, like the monstrous Bowser and a mysterious doll named Geno, in Super Mario RPG on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Let's make wings and fly. With paper, scissors and a little spaghetti, Jenny Barnett-Rohrs makes paper feathers. Then, she crafts fuzzy bug wings from felt. Artist Franz Spohn illustrates distance and perspective in his drawings of birds in flight. Jenny crafts a bird house for our feathered friends.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Our creativity takes to the air. Jenny Barnett-Rohrs and Katie Hacker make sparkly wings and Katie creates a funny spoon bird. Franz Spohn creates see-through bug wings and we'll make a very special chalkboard gift for Mom or Dad.

programme.title: Photography
programme.desc: Learn photography with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Baking
programme.desc: Learn to bake with CraftsyTV

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela whips up a stash-busting table topper using the quilt-as-you-go method Gudrun Erla teaches in her online class "Fast & Furious: Quilt-As-You-Go With Pre-Cuts."

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Looking for a fun beginner-friendly quilt? Angela’s got you covered with a super simple pattern that leaves plenty of room for the quilting — easy cutting, easy piecing, easy peasy!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Quilting just got better. Join Angela in her first episode as she stitches up her exclusive variable-star quilt design.

programme.title: Cupid's Arrow
programme.desc: Angela is back for Season 5 of the Midnight Quilt Show! Today she is making the Arrows Quilt by Krystal Jakelwicz, and incorporating a little love note into her machine quilting.

programme.title: Craft Hacks
programme.desc: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.

programme.title: Butter Book
programme.desc: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Take a walk on the wild side with some unique projects on this episode. First, Emily Thompson creates a quilted tablet cover - a perfect beginner project. Then, Cheryl Sleboda, our cosplay expert, has a novel idea for cosplay or plain fun: winged feet, you'll love these fun additions to your shoes. Last, Angela Wolf shares an optional addition to the wrap dress and a built-in tank top.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.sub-title: Quilt Techniques for all Types of Sewing
programme.desc: We apply quilting concepts to all sorts of different finished projects from pillows to skirts on this show. If you're a fashion sewer, quilting is a little break from fitting and if you're a quilter we have garments that incorporate your techniques in garments. First, Paula Reid shares her creative method for doing trapunto. Then, Jeni Baker has an easy but modern feeling quilt project -- this time it's the log cabin as coasters. Finally, Angela Wolf takes a quilt technique for seaming and uses it on a patchwork style skirt.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.desc: Hold onto your needles! Tracie and Jodi, are here to dish out fresh fiber inspiration. From project picks to wooly good gossip, things are about to get super knitty… and maybe just a little nutty.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.sub-title: Knitting So Good You Never Want to End + Favorite Bind-Offs
programme.desc: Give your knitting the happy ending it deserves! In the season finale of Off Our Needles, Tracie and Jodi talk about the bind-offs they love and the projects they never wanted to end.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.sub-title: SCANIA KNIT ALONG III: Short Row Corner
programme.desc: You've knit, purled and mock-cabled this far; keep the momentum going! In the third installment of the #OffOurKnitAlong, Tracie and Jodi demonstrate how to turn the corner on your Scania Shawl by working short rows.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.sub-title: Four Ways to Yarn Over in Pattern & Lace Knitting Demystified
programme.desc: Did you know there is more than one way to do a yarn over? Yup, there are actually four! This week Tracey and Jodi demonstrate all four techniques and talk about when to use each.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Let's turn toward ourselves for creative ideas. When she makes a lighted mirror, Jenny Barnett-Rohrs makes you a star. Katie Hacker makes personal paper dolls and Franz Spohn draws a 3D self-portrait. Jenny celebrates Thanksgiving with Pilgrim-style table decorations.

programme.title: Composition Essentials For Outdoor Photography
programme.desc: Learn photography with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Sink your teeth into current cake decorating trends! In the Man About Cake series, Joshua John Russell delivers incredible tips for creating modern edible masterpieces. Each week, he decorates an original cake, shares his favorite recipes and gives pointers for designing like a pro.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Your suggestions and votes from the MAC flavor contest inspired this piña colada cake! JJR channels the taste of the tropics with coconut and pineapple atop textured buttercream tiers.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Joshua John Russell creates modern, edible masterpieces with cake, fondant and buttercream.

programme.title: Mother's Day Gift Box Cake
programme.desc: Yo mama's so sweet...We made a cake for her! Tune in as JJR whips up a gorgeous gift box cake that might make up for all those grey hairs you gave Mom.

programme.title: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: -Cordless drills are a staple in many woodworking shops and deserve a dedicated storage stand. George Vondriska shows you how to make your own cordless drill stand, fully equipped with a power strip for easy charging, plus storage drawers for tips and bits. This project is great for practicing biscuit joinery and hand tool work.

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.desc: Use shapes in new ways. Modern Quilt Guild marketing director Heather Grant discusses the modern quilt aesthetic and modern quilt designs. Blogger Rossie Hutchinson joins quilter Elizabeth Dackson to talk about improv quilt events. Instructor Rebecca Kemp Brent uses the latest cutting and quilting technology to create a confetti star quilt design.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela shows you how to easily make a stash-buster pieced quilt back that can either match or contrast with your quilt top.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.sub-title: Bonus: 5 Items Around Your House to Use for Quilting
programme.desc: From cornstarch to cuticle pushers, Angela shares five ingenious hacks for using common household items for quilting.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: The Walters household is eating healthy this week, but that doesn't mean Angela's quilts have to be. Today she is whipping up the Milky Way Quilt by Monique Dillard featuring Lily & Loom fabric.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Vintage styles continue to cycle thru our wardrobes with subtle updates. Gretchen Hirsch epitomizes that vintage style with a lace bolero. Then, it's Kim Montagnese. Watch as she recycles a jacket with vintage details and demonstrates techniques for adding trims, lace and more. The show closes with Joanne Banko sharing tips for cutting and sewing silky fabrics.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Show off your style, when you create table top glamour. Your table is the star with this table setting from Rebecca Kemp Brent. Create beautiful accents and all over patterns using a frame. Then meet Joanne Hillestad and a beautiful table runner. This quick project personalizes your décor by season or color. Finally Angela is back with another tank variation; this time it's a lace insert.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: With a few supplies and cold connection techniques, designer Abbi Berta quickly creates mixed media earrings. She also makes a textured cuff with a torch-fired patina to introduce metalwork. Viewer Leslie Rocha tells how her first jewelry class and love of music blossomed into a passion for making jewelry from guitar wire and picks.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Express your style in metalwork and with lettering, too. Mary Hettmansperger adds a window in metal work to make a versatile bezel. She adds style by layering metals and putting a variety of motifs behind the window. Creative collaborator Brenda Schweder shares her favorite tips on soldering metalwork. Katie Hacker puts her style into words with lettering in Katie's Beading Lesson.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: Soup would be pretty boring if it was just broth. Scrapbook pages might also suffer the same fate without some interesting add-ons to rev them up. Explore beyond the norm with media mixage with Stacey Caron, add bezels, ribbon and buttons to create texture and dimension. Make a die cut frame with Jenny Barnett Rohrs and use up scraps of patterned paper in a grid design with Ronda Palazzari. Today's Scrapbook Soup is stocked with new ingredients.

Explore cheesemaking, indulge in sweet treats, and make cooking fun. Join "Liv B" for vegan twists, enroll in Cooking Panda Academy, and savor homemade bread with Chef Ale Gambini. Discover the joys of food with us!

programme.title: Tentacle 8
programme.desc: A mysterious computer virus wipes out highly classified personnel files at the NSA, prompting a top secret investigation. Raymond Berry, an NSA operative suspected of crimes against the United States, risks his life to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Susie's Hope
programme.desc: Based on a true story, the inspirational relationship between Donna Lawrence (Emmanuelle Vaguer) a pit bull attack survivor, and Susie (Susie Lawrence), an abused pit bull-mix puppy, as they learn to heal and forgive together.

programme.title: Like Sunday, Like Rain
programme.desc: Surrounded by wealth and living with abundant resources in Manhattan, 12-year-old cello prodigy Reggie, lives a solitary life lacking only frequently absent parents and friends. Estranged from family, having slacker boyfriend troubles, and fired from her waitressing job, sometimes musician 23-year-old Eleanor needs a new place to live and a new job.

programme.title: Watercolor Postcards
programme.desc: A small town girl with a troubled past returns home only to find that both her sister and her hometown are in peril. Only when she falls for a man who similarly has dark days behind him will they muster up the faith and love needed to save the things they hold dear in life.

programme.title: Walt Before Mickey
programme.desc: A young man named Walt Disney had big dreams, and no matter how many obstacles he had to face he never gave up--from his tumultuous childhood, to serving his country, to borrowing money, to the creation of his first iconic animated character Mickey Mouse.

programme.title: Camp Cool Kids
programme.desc: At their summer camp competition games, Spence and his big brother Zach find themselves on opposing teams: its the dweebs against the bullies. Can Spence make new friends, overcome his fears and find faith in himself, stand up to the bullies and win a trophy in the process?
