programme.desc: Sonia and Matt go to a garden center to repo a forklift, but a language barrier causes chaos.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: With the pressure of Froy's legal problems mounting, the team does everything they can to convince him to hire a lawyer. Froy and Matt confront a misogynist frat boy with a dark secret, Sonia and Froy wrangle with a squadron of costumed rally racers, and Lou, Matt, and Froy get the surprise of a lifetime when they're faced with a truck-full of vicious gangsters.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret. And finally, the team's attempt to repo fifteen bikes from a gym is not the morale booster Lou had hoped for.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: While Froy waits on news from his lawyer about his warrant in Texas, he considers taking matters into his own hands. Lou and Froy bust some slick moves in an attempt to wrangle a car from a debtor who is prepared to battle. Then, when one woman behaves like a child, Matt puts her in timeout, but worries he may have gone too far. And finally, Lou, Matt, and Froy take on an jealous husband with deadly aim.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy head to Texas to clear Froy's name, but things take a turn for the worse and Froy finds himself in more trouble than he can handle. Back in LA, Lou and Lyndah repo a car from a deceptive charity worker, and Lou is left to protect the girls from two knife wielding debtors who will go to any lengths to keep their vehicles.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When a debtor and his friends resort to baseball bats, chaos erupts, and Lou, Lyndah and Sonia fight not only with them, but also with each other. Down in Texas, Matt and Froy wait to clear up Froy's warrant and get in way over their heads working for a local repo team. Meanwhile, Lou decides to re-hire Frankie despite Sonia and Lyndah's objections, but first Lou wants to see how Frankie fares when faced with the temptation in the form of strippers and alcohol.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Down in Texas, Matt and Froy are staking out a cement mixer, but their repo turns disastrous when an innocent bystander gets showered in concrete. In LA, Frankie takes the reins with an alcoholic debtor, and Lou and Sonia deal with a diva who pushes Sonia to her breaking point.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.sub-title: Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose
programme.desc: First, Frankie and Lyndah find themselves in a fancy neighborhood, dealing with a pair of uptight yuppies with well-coordinated clothes and well-coordinated attacks. Then Lyndah goes wild when a truck-driving debtor gets physical with Sonia. And finally, Matt and Froy face down a backwoods Texan with secret ammunition.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy face incredible odds against a Texas-sized biker gang looking for a beat down, and when bullets fly, it starts to look like they may never come back home. Back in LA, Frankie's wild antics jeopardize a repo and push Lyndah to her breaking point.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy set out to repo a truck from a wealthy Texan, but their mission backfires when the Sheriff arrives with a new arrest warrant that will send Froy away for good.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou takes his new guys on their very first repo but, when the debtors attack with chainsaws, Ronnie and Carlos are left to fend for themselves.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou plans an elaborate sting operation to infiltrate a cult, but everything goes awry when the new guys aren't prepared and Matt is left picking up the pieces.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia repo from a stranded motorist who rallies the neighborhood around his cause and incites a full on revolt. Ronnie and Carlos set out on their first unsupervised repo, but their desire to impress is quickly derailed when an erratic debtor lets loose with pepper spray.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.sub-title: Vinyasa for Life: From Cobra to Camel
programme.desc: This vinyasa class applies what you learned in Day 1 so you can play with classic backbends and steady transitions. Schuyler guides you through Cobra (Bhujangasana), Locust (Salabhasana), and Camel (Ustrasana), finishing off with Bridge (Setu Bandhasana) and spine-clearing twists. Take it slow and build strength!

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life
programme.sub-title: Vinyasa for Life: Foundations of Forward Bending
programme.desc: In this class, you begin with a brief anatomy of forward folds, followed by a dive into Standing Forward Fold (Uttanasana) and Wide-Legged Forward Fold (Prasarita Padottanasana). Regardless of your flexibility, this lab is designed to help you to safely find length through the entire back chain of your body.

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life
programme.sub-title: Vinyasa for Life: Forward Bending for Forward Thinking
programme.desc: Use what you learned in Day 4 to stretch the hamstrings and your backbody safely and effectively. Bring attention to your spine in Downward Facing Dog (Adho Mukha Svanasana) and Intense Side Stretch (Parsvottanasana), before working on Hand-to-Big-Toe Pose (Padangusthasana) with a strap. Finish in a supported backbend to counter your diligent forward folding.

programme.title: Commune Meditation Summit
programme.desc: In this lesson, you will focus on the gift of the body temple, which is the signature for revealing life, love, peace, joy, wisdom, harmony, and abundance. When the body’s temple is healthy, you can hold more energy. More of life’s cosmic energy can flow through you.

programme.title: Commune Meditation Summit
programme.desc: Every one of us, at any point in time, is living in one of two states of being. We are either in a suffering state or we are living in a beautiful state. When you are in a beautiful state of connection, you enter a new realm where synchronicities unfold, where the randomly moving universe arranges itself into patterns to fulfill your heart's desires. Use this meditation practice to manifest heart-felt intentions in your life.

programme.title: Commune Meditation Summit
programme.desc: In this grounding meditation, allow yourself to let go and relax your mind and body so you can slip into a state of deep rest and rejuvenation.

programme.title: Commune Meditation Summit
programme.desc: Appreciation is a form of wellness. It’s also what keeps us moving through difficult times and what brings us back to love time and again. More importantly, when you tie your gratitude to the “why” of it, you develop new forms of appreciation and depths of connection for living.

programme.title: Commune Meditation Summit
programme.desc: Today, we're going to be talking about opening to joy. Many people, like evolutionary biologists, will say that we are wired to predominantly look for danger, for threats, for what's wrong in our lives, and that it could take some conscious effort, a kind of intentionality, to take in the good and be able to acknowledge it.

programme.title: Commune Meditation Summit
programme.desc: In this lesson with Light Watkins, you will learn to examine bliss as more than a buzzword. You’ll come to see and know it as a powerful state of presence that is accessible through the practice of meditation.

programme.title: Commune Meditation Summit
programme.desc: Today, you will learn how to tap into your unwavering inner knowing, which is also and often called your intuition. Kimberly Synder shares why being connected to your inner source of beauty is so important.

programme.title: The Superpowers of Your Gut
programme.sub-title: The Superpowers of Your Gut - Day 1
programme.desc: Human biology is a symphony played between the body and the greater nature around us. The great conductor of that symphony, in many ways, is the gut and microbiome. This course will take a multifaceted look at this organ system � which is our primary interface with the chemistry of the world � so you can get an understanding of how to co-create health and well-being.

programme.title: The Superpowers of Your Gut
programme.sub-title: The Superpowers of Your Gut - Day 2
programme.desc: You have an intimate relationship with everything you put in your mouth. The tongue is a magical instrument for you to start to remember the power of flavor and nutrients, to slow it down and experience food again.

programme.title: The Superpowers of Your Gut
programme.sub-title: The Superpowers of Your Gut - Day 3
programme.desc: The esophagus is simply a tube that runs from mouth to stomach, moving food from one to the other. And yet, as we dig into its structure, we find an extraordinarily complicated and intricate organ that has a deep relationship to the beauty of the body. The reality of this simple tube ends up displaying the sheer miracle of a day in the life of a human being.

programme.title: The Superpowers of Your Gut
programme.sub-title: The Superpowers of Your Gut - Day 4
programme.desc: In terms of its surface area and musculature, the stomach is designed to listen to your food. What is your stomach listening to? It�s listening to how your food was grown, lived, and died. It�s picking up on the microRNA that was in your food right at the moment you consumed it.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: As humans, we are constantly struggling between the poles of what we think we want and what is. When we lose touch with the truth of what is, we create and compound our suffering. What narratives are you constructing? Are they in conflict with the truth of the situation? Are you struggling with what is?

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: The way you recall a memory and the way it actually happened might be completely different. The question is, do you know which version feeds you? We can become so wrapped up in our recollections, we convince ourselves of these untruths. Is that person a monster? Were they wishing you harm? Or were they dealing with a difficult situation in the best way they knew how?

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: Stop focusing on the object of your desires and start focusing on the reason for desiring that object in the first place. When you turn it around, you may find that what you really want is completely different than what you’ve been telling yourself.

programme.title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency
programme.sub-title: Section 1: The Addiction Frequency & The Power of Breath
programme.desc: Breathing is the single most important thing we do. Addiction is characterized by a sense of lack, of missing something. And when you breathe poorly, like when anxious or angry, you’re caught up in your head and aren’t breathing well and that sends a signal to your body that perpetuates the addiction frequency. Deep, long breathing is how we interrupt this pattern.

programme.title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency
programme.sub-title: Section 2: Importance of Morning & Evening Practices
programme.desc: If you take care of the bookends of the day, the rest of the day will take care of itself. It’s such a powerful idea for people to understand that when we wake up in the morning, most people wake up with anxiety, fear, and negativity. So, we need to do something right away to set ourselves straight, to create the conditions for the best day possible, regardless of the circumstances that we're facing in the outside world.

programme.title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency
programme.desc: Addiction is felt and experienced in the mind. The mind is a terrible master but a wonderful servant. We must understand its functions as it’s an important aspect of addiction recovery and learning how to thrive. So, the key question is this: How do you get the mind to serve the heart, rather than staying trapped in serving the mind? Only heightened awareness can end the inner war.

programme.title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency
programme.sub-title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency: Q&A
programme.desc: Questios and Answers for the series, Break Out of the Addiction Frequency.

programme.title: Yoga For All

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your day 5 practice introduces principles of stability or Sthira. Though this practice we learn to to steady the mind as we strengthen the body. programme.title: Qigong: The Eight Brocades
programme.desc: This practice begins by tending to both the Yin and Yang meridians in your body. You’ll start with a soothing self-massage, which is beneficial to the health of your vagus nerve, especially if you experience overwhelm or often feel depleted. Allow yourself to feel calm and bright as you practice the fifth and sixth Silk Brocades.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition is in Bulgaria where Ervin Katona (SCL World Champion 2012) will compete for the last time.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Krzysztof Radzikowski, the leader in the league will fight hard to keep Dainis Zageris off from the title and to gather another 25 ranking points in this next stage in Latvia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The competition sees a close battle with a new world record in overhead dumbbell and close finishes throughout the day. This stage is in Croatia, in a city over 1700 years old, steeped in Roman tradition and history, the athletes arrive for the truck pull after a picturesque boat ride on the Adriatic Sea.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are now half way through the SCL 2015 and getting closer to the grand world finals in Turkey. The eighth stage is in Poland, the home country of the current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this stage we go into the mountains of Austria to find out through six grueling events who is the strongest in the land of Alps. Martin Wildauer, current World Champion 2014 and Austrian local is competing alongside Zageris, Radzikowski, Belsak and many others.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The 10th stage of this year's competition in Strongman Champions League is held in the Romanian city of Sibiu where the 12 strongmen continue to compete for the title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship
programme.desc: The 11th stage is the SCL Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. In this championship, each competitor must lift three different weights overhead. Zydrunas Savickas is the current world record holder in the Log Lift.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This next episode of the Strongman Champions League is hosted in Lithuania and sees us getting one step closer to the final.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The 13th stage of Strongman Champions League is in Maia, Portugal. The competition is at the “Powerexpo” – one of the best sport and fitness events in Portugal.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This stage is in Martinique and eight strongmen from all over the world will compete for the last chance to gather points before the world grand finals in December.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 15, Lightweight World Championship
programme.desc: A special World championship under the newcomers and lightweights in the Strongman world. Some of them will step from this to the heavyweights divisions.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 16, World Finals Turkey
programme.desc: After 15 outstanding competitions all over the world, finally we are here at the final competition of this year’s Strongman Champions League hosted in Turkey.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 1, Norway - World strongest Viking
programme.desc: Welcome to the land of Vikings - Norway - to the first stage of the SCL World Series 2016

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The second stage of the SCL heads to the FIBO convention, Cologne. The leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health hosts.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 3, Lithuania - Log lift World championship
programme.desc: For the third stage of SCL world series 2016, the athletes compete in Kaunas for the SCL Log Lift World Championships.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stage four is an epic competition and a few surprises. With 14 strongmen from all over the world, one newcomer left quite an impression.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This year Lauri Nami joins the starting list, back after last year's injury in Romania

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The SCL train stopped in Zlatibor for the stage 6 of the MLO SCL. 11 compete for the title in the home country of legendary Ervin Katona.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Bulgaria hosts the next stage of the SCL. Current leader in the World Series is Matjaz Belsak, youngest competitor and strongest man of Slovenia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The competitors battle it out in the special event, the Atlas Steel Stone. This stone is made completely from iron and cannot be touched with any support.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This stage sees the strongmen visit Vaasa, Finland. Residents here are familiar with the competition because some of the SCL icons are from their country.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 10, Finland - World championship under 105 kilograms

programme.desc: A two day, seven event battle with lots of spectators.

programme.title: Poker Masters
programme.desc: The Event #5: $10,000 8-Game final table is set at the 2022 Poker Masters! Cary Katz is the chip leader ahead of Nick Guagenti, Alex Livingston, Steve Zolotow, Benjamin Diebold, Jacky Wang, and Brian Rast, as the final seven players play for the $186,000 first-place prize.

programme.title: Poker Masters
programme.desc: The Event #6: $10,000 No-Limit Hold'em final table is set at the 2022 Poker Masters! Masashi Oya is the chip leader ahead of Matthew Wantman, Justin Saliba, Martin Zamani, Jared Jaffee, Ken Aldridge, Anthony Hu, Jesse Lonis, and Dan Shak, as the final nine players play for the $223,100 first-place prize.

programme.title: World Series of Poker
programme.desc: Just 50 players return on Day 6 of the WSOP Main Event as Marcel Luske headlines the feature table along with John Murphy. On the outer tables, Josh Arieh and David Williams begin their run up the leaderboard, while previous champions Chris Ferguson and Dan Harrington remain in contention as just 32 players remain.

programme.title: World Series of Poker
programme.desc: There are 32 players remaining on Day 6 of the WSOP Main Event. Chip leader Greg Raymer headlines the feature table along with Josh Arieh and Dan Harrington. The elimination of Chris Ferguson leaves Harrington as the sole Main Event champion remaining, while the field is reduced to just 17 players.

programme.title: World Series of Poker
programme.desc: The biggest No-Limit Hold'em buy-in of the 2004 WSOP outside of the Main Event would attract 254 entrants and create a prize pool of $1,193,800. Barry Greenstein and Dewey Tomko fell short of reaching the final table, as WSOP veterans James Sousa and Paul "Eskimo" Clark headlined the final table ahead of Lee Watkinson, Thomas Keller, Martin de Knijff, and Young Phan as they chased the $382,020 first-place prize.

programme.title: World Series of Poker

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: With everything breaking down Dustin and Randy head to an auction to hopefully save their weekend plans of getting seed into the ground.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The Pacific Northwest does not have the easiest conditions to train in for this shooting sports team. For this Seattle-based SST Ravens, this skeet and trap team finds that the challenging weather they train in comes in handy when competing. Also: Competition shooting tips form pro shooter Theo Ribbs.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: "Half Way There - Chilean Wigeon & Rosy Bill | , South America Waterfowl Slam"
programme.desc: Mark Peterson closes out the half way point on the South America Waterfowl Slam. On just the third day of the hunt, he is able to take a Chilean Wigeon and a Rosy Billed Pochard which make species number 9 and 10 of the 20 on his list. Mark is still sharing the blind with Matt Gindorff, a WTA consultant, and they discuss waterfowl hunting in Argentina and how it compares to that of the U.S.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: In this episode, Slade and his son take on the turkey woods for an afternoon hunt. Although the woods remained quiet, a tom soon snuck out of the woods and on the end of Bentley's barrel! After that Slade was able to help a client of his harvest his first turkey! And boy was it an action packed hunt! Jakes, hens, and tons of gobbles, This hunt is spectacular! Lastly, Slade introduces a property that we have already made a video on, but with just how amazing the land is, we had to include it! Floweree is the epitome of a sportsman's paradise!
Adam Hays is no stranger to world class bucks, but last year it - took patience and determination to harvest this Illinois giant with - 3 days left in the season!

programme.title: The Hunted Land & Sea
programme.desc: Grant Ellsworth hunts the Hansen Ranch during rifle season hoping to get remaining hit list bucks “The Big Guy” in the freezer or the “Management buck” down before the rut.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: Kyle Barefield and Cole Barthel from All Things Hunting head to the Rocky Mountains with Browning Rifles in hand after “Wapiti” the Native American Term meaning “White Rump” referring to Elk.

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
programme.desc: Notoriously nocturnal and living in some of the densest cover imaginable, the black-tailed deer is generally known to be more ghostly than the most challenging old whitetails.

programme.title: The Huntsman
programme.desc: In an age of individuum it feels like it's never been harder to raise and maintain a healthily, caring family. The divorce rate has never been higher, screens and devices are stealing everyone's attention and our children are paying the price. Well, in this episode Chris Waters (The Huntsman) been invited by his friends the Playdon family to their wetland paradise to witness a different culture. A culture that has only recently been at risk of being taken away from us. A culture that celebrates nature, discovery, food, intergenerational skill building, family and, you guessed it... duck hunting! Join us on this Australian family duck hunting adventure.

programme.title: The Raven Project

programme.title: Full Strut

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: The second split is here, and the crew decides to try their luck at historic Old Hickory in Lacour, Louisiana. Ducks, deer, and mouth-watering meals are all on the menu.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "The ULTIMATE Ireland Food Road Trip | Surfing, Golfing & Delicious Eats"
programme.desc: For DIRT’s first trip across the pond, host Josh Rosen dove head first into Ireland. From long-held traditions to the modern-day artisanal movement, he unearthed the multicultural goldmine between the highlands and the Wild Atlantic Way—with stops for surfing, a seaweed bath, and a couple holes of golf spectated by free-range goats, of course. Foraged cocktails? Fresh crabs from Galway Bay? It’s all on the table in this episode rooted in community, homegrown ingredients, and the damn good people who bring it all together. Subscribe to our YouTube channel to catch up on all of DIRT’s past adventures.

programme.title: TRP
programme.sub-title: "Cleaning up our Oceans with Capt. Neill Holland"
programme.desc: his week, I welcome back Capt. Neill Holland of Ocean Aid 360! Ocean Aid 360 along with Reef Relief, Surfrider, CCA, Beach Weekend, FWC, and NOAA, are leading a THREE DAY marine debris cleanup event that spans four hours each day, featuring daily raffle prizes, free lunches, and swag bags. They are inviting walkers, boaters, kayakers, and paddlers to join forces for a much-needed cleanup of the area. You can participate for one day or all three! Not only will you have a chance to WIN major prizes through daily raffles, but you'll also be contributing to the preservation of marine habitats and wildlife. - The event starts 9/13/23 and ends 9/15/23. You can learn more and join this clean up here: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/key-haven-coastal-community-cleanup-tickets-709576130307?aff=ebdsoporgprofile - At Ocean Aid 360, the belief is clear: environmental preservation and the livelihoods of marine-dependent communities are inseparable. Captain Neill Holland, a St. Pete, Florida native with a rich background in marine conservation, shares his journey from a career at National Geographic magazine to leading this impactful non-profit. - Tune in to gain insights into the remarkable work of Ocean Aid 360 and Captain Neill Holland's dedication to the preservation of our marine ecosystems. It's an episode filled with hope, innovation, and a shared vision of a brighter future for our oceans. - Follow Capt Neill on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gofishtampabay/ - Follow OCEAN AID 360 on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oceanaid360 - https://www.oceanaid360.org - https://www.gofishtampabay.com - #MarineConservation #OceanAid360 #MarineDebrisCleanup #CommunityCleanup #CleanOceans #EnvironmentalStewardship #MarineHabitat #VolunteerForChange #SaveOurSeas #EcoFriendly #WildlifeProtection #SustainableLiving #ProtectTheOcean #RafflePrizes #BeachCleanup #ConservationHeroes #EnvironmentalPartnerships #OceanProtection #CoastalCleanup #CleanerOceans #TeamSeas - WEBSITES: - http://www.saltwaterexperience.com - http://www.tomrowlandpodcast.com - STREAM ALL OUR FULL SEASONS ON WAYPOINT TV: http://waypointtv.com/#!/saltwaterexperience

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The main event will see two of the light heavyweight division’s most explosive young prospects clash as Romania’s Stefan Latescu (17-3, 8 KO) faces Turkey’s Cem Caceres (16-1, 13 KO). Belgium based Albanian Berjan Peposhi (29-4, 16 KO) will compete in the co-main event. The always exciting featherweight welcomes rising star Ayoub Bourass (14-1, 4 KO) in to make his GLORY debut. International Muay Thai superstar Youssef Boughanem (188-43-8, 120 KO) returns for his sophomore GLORY outing against tough Italian Angelo Volpe (38-5, 12 KO). Former middleweight title contender Serkan Ozcaglayan (45-10, 36 KO) takes on Antwerp’s own Jente Nnamadim (21-5, 11 KO), who comes in to make his GLORY debut in his hometown.

programme.title: Nothing But Bangers
programme.desc: 2 hours of nothing but great knockouts and exciting fights.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: A five-round heavyweight title eliminator between the number one ranked contender Levi Rigters (18-2, 8 KO) and ‘The Golden Wolf’ Bahram Rajabzadeh (69-3, 61 KO). The winner will face ‘The King of Kickboxing’ Rico Verhoeven (64-10, 21 KO) on December 7 in the main event of COLLISION 7. In the co-main event of the evening, Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (25-4-1, 13 KO) clashes with Nico ‘Big Sexy’ Horta (23-9, 3 KO) in a monster heavyweight clash with big implication for the rankings. Croatian kickboxing legend Mladen Brestovac (55-14-1, 37 KO) will make his final walk to the ring in his hometown of Zagreb. ‘The Scorpion Sting’ will take on newcomer Karim Dian (16-13, 3 KO) to cap off an illustrious career. Top ten heavyweights Nordine Mahieddine (28-15, 13 KO) and Nikola Filipovic (11-2, 6 KO) will collide in what is a guaranteed barn burner between two prolific KO artist.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: A Champ vs. Champ superfight takes place in the main event as GLORY welterweight world champion Chico Kwasi (43-5, 23 KO) puts his title on the line against GLORY lightweight world champ Tyjani Beztati (27-4, 9 KO). In the co-main event, Donovan Wisse (21-1, 10 KO) aims to defend his GLORY middleweight world championship for a fifth time when he welcomes the challenge of top German Sergej Braun (44-13, 27 KO).

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six more renowned robots fight their way through the heats to fight for a chance to be the All-Star champion. One competitor in particular strikes fear into the roster. The two winners of each heat face off for the title in the Grand Final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The Extreme Series continues with the Annihilator; a knockout competition between six competitors, over the course of four rounds and a final, six will be reduced to one, the annihilator champion.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A knockout tournament with children at the helm. Will the house robots go easy on the kids, or will they just be easy targets?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Sixteen robots make eight teams in this Tag Team Terror. With only one robot permitted to battle at a time, will the teams share responsibility or will one bite off more than they can chew?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The New Blood Heats consisted of two three-way melees and then head-to-head battles, the two winners of the latter would fight, and the remaining robot would be sent to the Grand Finals. The champions would gain automatic entry to The Seventh Wars.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Robot Wars returns. The House Robots have been upgraded and are ready to dismantle any of the 40 competing teams brave enough to enter the hazardous arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A Consultant Cardiologist and his two sons try their luck with a brand new, untested machine. Judge Sethu Vijayakumar discusses his work with Nasa in creating androids for the Mission to Mars.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This show features an eclectic collection of home-made robots, one designed by a nine year old and another constructed out of wood. Some competitors from the Classic series return to the arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: In this show we see the former Holiday camp Bluecoats daring to flip two of the House Robots with their ‘launcher’ Apollo. The most expensive Robot in the Series competes in this Heat.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This features one of the most bizarre but certainly the tallest robot ever seen on Robot Wars, Gabriel, built my Mensa member Craig and his three sons.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: In this show the heat winners in shows 1 to 5 come back to fight again. The judges must choose one Wild Card from the runners up to join them.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, this competitor became an instant icon.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. This Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The first heat of the All-Stars Championship, this heat determines which two robots go through to All-stars grand-final. Veteran robots all enter the arena once again as they put their experience to the test against each other.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six more renowned robots fight their way through the heats to fight for a chance to be the All-Star champion. One competitor in particular strikes fear into the roster. The two winners of each heat face off for the title in the Grand Final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The Extreme Series continues with the Annihilator; a knockout competition between six competitors, over the course of four rounds and a final, six will be reduced to one, the annihilator champion.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Sixteen robots make eight teams in this Tag Team Terror. With only one robot permitted to battle at a time, will the teams share responsibility or will one bite off more than they can chew?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The New Blood Heats consisted of two three-way melees and then head-to-head battles, the two winners of the latter would fight, and the remaining robot would be sent to the Grand Finals. The champions would gain automatic entry to The Seventh Wars.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The New Blood heats continue as six more robots come to test their metal. One of the competitors takes a beating from the house robots, will it spell the end of their time in the competition?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The arena welcomes six new combatants during the third round of the heats. One competitor that seemingly lacks a weapon, surprises the judges. The two new house robots both get a chance to attack.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The Fourth and last heat to decide which robots will make it to the final. Refbot loses his patience and starts inflicting harm on the competitors.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The Four winners of the heats face each other in two eliminators, a play-off and a final battle between the two remaining robots. Only the most ferocious robot will be able to call themselves, the New Blood Champions.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A champion will emerge for each weight class battling in this Robot Rampage. Including Antweight, Middleweight, Lightweight and Featherweight.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A battle for one of the most prized robot wars possessions, the challenge belt. Challengers must defeat each other and take on the current holders, Tornado, if they are to claim it for themselves.

programme.title: King Arthur: History and Legend

programme.title: Herodotus: The Father of History

programme.title: Herodotus: The Father of History

programme.title: Herodotus: The Father of History

programme.desc: How does Herodotus model his work on the Iliad and the Odyssey?

programme.title: The Life and Work of Mark Twain
programme.sub-title: From Samuel Clemens to Mark Twain
programme.desc: In this biographical episode, learn how to see Twain's life as a life of milestones.

programme.title: The Life and Work of Mark Twain
programme.sub-title: The Sense of Mark Twain's Humor

programme.title: The Life and Work of Mark Twain
programme.desc: In this episode, explore the marketing schemes Twain used to maximize his income.

programme.title: Roadfood Adventures USA
programme.desc: Travel the South to find the most colorful roads in the nation and discover delicious food, magnificent scenery, magic moments, and fascinating people all along the way.

programme.title: Into America's Wild
programme.desc: Step off the beaten path and connect to your inner trailblazer in this cross-country journey to some of the most beautiful but little-known landscapes of North America. Into America’s Wild is a non-stop ride via kayak, train, bike, hot air balloon and more that explores the transformational allure of wild places and the human connection we all share with the natural world.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric treks the canyons and waters of Lake Powell, Utah on foot and via packraft.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric leaves the backcountry to discover urban hiking adventures in the cities of Los Angeles and San Francisco, California.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 1
programme.desc: Canadians Sophie and Anna go on a journey of discovery, luck and love in the Cradle of Liberty, Boston, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 2
programme.desc: Gabby and Jono try their luck in panoramic Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 3
programme.desc: Percy and Michelle go on a game of chance in the Emerald city of Seattle.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Sonoma, CA
programme.desc: I’m in a destination that is easily considered to be one of the most beautiful in the world. A place of immense natural beauty that helps create a renewed connection to nature. Here’s why Sonoma County is a place to love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Madison, WI
programme.desc: There’s nothing quite like a destination that knows how to embrace the cold. Samantha loves winter, and she's always looking for places that love it just as much. Join her as she explores the many reasons why Madison, Wisconsin is a Place to Love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Brown Places to Love: Big Sky, MT
programme.desc: Welcome to Big Sky, Montana! This is a destination that sees 400 inches of powder on average and is home to nearly 6,000 skiable acres. No matter the season or how low the temperatures drops, there’s always something inspiring to find if you’re curious enough to look. From embracing the snowy outdoors to enjoying the local businesses of a tight knit community, join Samantha as she explores what makes Big Sky a Place to Love.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy dives into a serious beef bonanza with scratch-made meaty ravioli in Delaware, an elevated spin on the French dip in San Diego and beefed-up Middle-Eastern fare in El Paso, Texas.

programme.title: The Main Event
programme.desc: Join hosts Amon Focus and J. Damany Daniel as they dive into the heart of America’s oldest Mardi Gras celebration in Mobile, Alabama.

programme.title: Amplify
programme.desc: Singer/songwriter Summer Dean visits her college stomping grounds and discovers it offers more music history than Buddy Holly. Punk rock drummer Phanie Diaz checks out local art in San Antonio and rapper Lou Charles.

programme.title: Destination Route 66: Roadside Attractions
programme.desc: Route 66 is lined with wonderful and informative attractions. Here are just a few of those must-see stops!

programme.title: Destination Route 66: Great Stays
programme.desc: Rest your head after a long day driving Route 66. Check in to these great accommodations along the way!

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.sub-title: Small Town Big Story: Where Lobster Is Always On the Menu - Rockland, ME
programme.desc: From lobster lovers to badass lobsterwomen, the charming seaside village of Rockland offers something for everyone—especially during the Rockland Lobster Festival, a delightful combination of games, art, and some of the freshest lobster you'll find anywhere.

programme.title: Beach Battles
programme.sub-title: Beach Battles: Winchester Bay & Long Beach
programme.desc: High-octane dune racing in Winchester Bay, Oregon, plus high-flying Kitefest fun in Long Beach, Washington.

programme.title: Beach Battles
programme.desc: Dive into the fun blowing conchs in Key West, Florida and race pro SUPS in Wrightsville Beach, North Carolina.

programme.title: One Perfect Day in Kentucky
programme.desc: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF’s Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly’s ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky’s own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly’s horse wins the race. At Louisville’s Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: For this episode, Ben’s planned an EPIC 48 hours in Utah, starting in Salt Lake City before venturing down to Zion National Park - but what will the other guys make of his itinerary?

programme.title: United Dates of America
programme.desc: Ruairi, Hardeep, and Luke head south to meet local singles in young and vibrant Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: United Dates of America
programme.desc: Ruairi, Hardeep, and Luke try their luck dating in artsy Providence, Rhode Island.

programme.title: United Dates of America
programme.desc: Ruairi, Hardeep, and Luke set out to meet local singles in outdoorsy Denver, Colorado.

programme.title: Samantha Brown Places to Love: Brooklyn
programme.desc: When you think New York City, you probably envision Manhattan. Yet a lot of the city’s heart and soul resides in Brooklyn. As one of the five boroughs in the USA’s largest city, Brooklyn is actually quite huge. But don’t let the size alarm you—this borough has a low-key, neighborhood vibe that’s devoid of the Manhattan hustle. Add in diverse neighborhoods, great food and unexpected businesses, and Brooklyn is a place to love.

programme.title: Something in the Water
programme.desc: Chronicles singer-songwriter Steve Azar's endeavor to record his album Down at the Liquor Store at the historic Club Ebony in Indianola, Mississippi with a group of storied musicians.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: In the middle of rural Maine, Paul and Nick create an outside barbeque for the family of John Mann, an eighth generation Ulster-Scot immigrant. The Manns are true frontier-people, and completely self sufficient from their land.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Chefs Paul Rankin and Nick Nairn are in Lexington, Virginia to cook for descendants of the Ulster-Scots Lewis family who settled in the area in the 18th century. Along the way they visit a heritage pig farmer, taste some sparkling cider and they discover some delicious goat’s cheese in the heart of Virginia’s Piedmont region where Paul has a close encounter with a friendly goat…

programme.title: Playgrounds
programme.desc: See some of the best playgrounds in the USA through the lens of athletes.

programme.title: USA Through Music
programme.desc: American cities have long played a starring role in its music. Notable musicians tell personal stories about how their favorite cities inspire their work.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern
programme.sub-title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago is a city of both innovation and tradition. From immigrants cooking up classics to world-renowned chefs creating new concoctions with modern technology, Andrew gets a taste of Chicago's diverse food scene.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern
programme.sub-title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Andrew takes to the road to sample the Pennsylvania staples most people never hear about. A Japanese superstar chef cooks up poisonous sexual organs and a family boils up every part of the pig.

programme.title: Diners Drive-ins and Dives Sammies and Stews
programme.desc: In Santa Fe, N.M., the cafe with a native Kenyan in the kitchen serving up totally fresh fish. And in Albuquerque, N.M., the school lunch maven crankin' out creative sammies like turkey avocado with green apple chile chutney.

programme.title: National Parks Adventure

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Portland
programme.desc: Welcome to a city that has pioneered self-expression! Between its proximity to the great outdoors and its culture of creativity, this urban hub has influenced an entire nation on trends in everything from food to design all the while encouraging its residents to embrace their individuality. Join Samantha as she meets the people that make Portland, Oregon a Place to Love.

programme.title: Samantha Brown: Naples, Fl
programme.desc: Known for thousands of miles of coastline, Florida’s sugar-fine sand beaches and sunshine attract over 110 million visitors annually. In the quest for the ultimate beach vacation, it’s important not to overlook what was there before. From wildlife to indigenous peoples, there’s so much more to Southwest Florida than meets they eye. And while there’s lots of history here, the Sunshine State’s future is looking as bright as ever. It’s easy to see why the Florida’s Paradise Coast is a place to love.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Hurtling down the water passageway on the journey to The Dark, the party's boat takes a beating. Luckily for them, this means their captor The Lovely Lute takes a beating as well. Now they must try to continue their mission for the Crystal Rod.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.sub-title: The Short Adventures of Thistle & Arky
programme.desc: Who better to go poking around in goblin tunnels than the only members of the party who will fit inside?! But what Arky and Thistle find in the warrens is not what they expected…

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party finds the dwarven city of Iron Stone. Unfortunately, it is under siege by strange magical creatures. And what has become of that dangerous assassin, the Lovely Lute?

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Coming upon the lava-fueled dwarven forge, the party begins to craft anti-magical emerald-imbued weapons. That is, until the whole building begins to shake...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Iron Stone is saved! As thanks, the party receives a bounty of magical crystals and a powerful new iron suit for Arky. Now they head for Rock Bottom, a duegar dwarf city beneath a waterfall in the dark Underground.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Reaching Pelion Darrus, the Party finds it under devastating attack from above and below. One hero makes an unexpected journey, dragging the party into a surprising decision in this weeks episode!

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The Audio Dungeon crew begin their adventure in the world of Andaria. Finndelar (Tom) the wizard, and Hogar (Dan) the ranger, have just finished their two month journey, and have reached their destination; The Sunken City. Finn's mission is to retrieve a magical device created in part by a local craftsman: Arkie Fint. Hogar, an ally of Finn, was hired to guide and protect him. When they arrive, they find themselves in the midst of a large celebration, as well as a mystery regarding their mission...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Finndelar (Tom) and Hogar (Dan) have arrived in the Sunken City and are now searching for the magical device they have journeyed so far for. After meeting the craftsman Arkie Fint, they travel to Smithy's tavern in hope of finding a clue to their mystery...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Smithy's party has proven to be entertaining and everyone is enjoying themselves. Meanwhile, during the festivities, Bludgy, the city's most notorious thief is seen sneaking upstairs, drawing the attention of others. Finn and Hogar's mission hangs in the balance...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Finn and Hogar are tied up below Smithy's tavern along with a few others. Bludgy is about to sell off the crystal rod for a life changing amount ofgold, while Arkie is "retrieving" something important from his workshop.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party, now in possession of the CRYSTAL ROD, has fled from the thieves in the Sunken City through the underground tunnels. Once outside, they discover the Queen's forces are invading from the sea, bombarding the city. They quickly slip out beyond the walls, north of the city... but to go where?

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party has been caught trying to escape and with them, the Artifact. Eventually they wake up shackled to a cart, and surrounded by guards on their way back into the occupied Sunken City… at the mercy of the Queen's Forces.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: "The party has adjusted to their new lives the best ways they know, how but they are eager to escape. - - Follow the party as they continue working their 9 to 5 jobs with only one lunch break and four 15 minute coffee breaks fun by the evil Queen’s forces."

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: "The Party is in action, and so is the party. Our would be heroes are posing as entertainment to get aboard the rooks ship and steal back the rod before they can escape. - - Will they succeed?"

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: "Our Party, aka Blackwater Bandits, have earned their name stealing back the rod from the Rook. Now its time for one more performance... the disappearing act. - - Will they succeed in this mid-season finale?"

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The Players awake with no memories and must quickly work together to navigate a dangerous dungeon. The extra twist? They have no idea they are playing their actual characters!

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party has passed the trial! With acceptance into the city of Anwar, their new goal is recovering those stolen memories...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Tragedy has struck the party, a member has fallen. Adding to their strife, they now find themselves in yet another tough situation below Anwar.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Hurtling down the water passageway on the journey to The Dark, the party's boat takes a beating. Luckily for them, this means their captor The Lovely Lute takes a beating as well. Now they must try to continue their mission for the Crystal Rod.

New routines such as Coming Home at 4am have already become cult faves and Bruer favorites like The Party have received a musical facelift. Jim's uncanny impressions, such as Brian Johnson of AC/DC, are also included.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: Ethen Roberts takes us off the grid for some mountain-biking, moto riding, rock climbing, snowboarding & wakeboarding

programme.title: Argo's World

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator’s text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here.

programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Woodventures
programme.desc: "Woodventures" is an animated series for preschool children. The main characters are wooden toys: Kitty Meow, Doggy Woof-Woof, Piggy Oink, Horsey Yee-Ho-Ho and Elephant Pawoo. The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child's play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. "Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment. Toys, along with the audience, learn about colors, shapes, objects, come out of difficult situations, learn about friendship and the world in general. The series is simple, kind and funny.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner… his mom!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Rivers End

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: In this episode of Squad, follow the team’s journey to South Korea for Worlds. Experience the thrill of being an underdog, uncover the off-screen skills needed for top-level play, and go behind the scenes of their rollercoaster tournament experience.

programme.title: Fresh on the LCS Scene
programme.desc: The LCS is tough, with seasoned teams dominating. Join us as we relive our very first LCS game, showcasing our early days and how we competed with top teams. Watch to see just how far we've come from our humble beginnings!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Time to learn from our mistakes
programme.desc: Join Team Liquid as we revisit a tough loss from our first LCS match. Watch our players analyze mistakes, learn, and prepare for the next opportunity. Our dedication to improvement shows that there's always room for growth, no matter your skill level.

programme.title: Too Hot To Handle: League Edition
programme.desc: In this spicy episode, our League pros face off in a 1v1 while eating the world’s spiciest chips every minute! Can they handle the heat? Then, Coach Marin tackles rapid-fire questions, and CoreJJ shares his journey in a heartfelt "Draw My Life" segment. Don't miss it!

programme.title: From Smite Loser To League World Champion
programme.desc: Pyosik’s journey shows that even in tough moments, victory is possible! Today’s episode revisits his Worlds win despite missed smites, showcasing his dedication. Then, Razah joins to predict this year’s Six Invitational winner—don’t miss the insights!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: We’re back with *Two People Talking*! Disguised Toast is joined by Chef Triciaisabirdy, known for her cooking shows and tutorials on Twitch. Watch as they discuss cooking techniques, share Twitch funny moments, and even give her mom a call!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Bigger isn't always better! Watch our Dota 2 team tackle a 1 vs. 1 challenge using the world’s largest keyboard and mouse—a 14:1 scale Alienware AW420K and AW720M. See their performance and then join us in Time Lapse to witness Team Liquid break Secret's dominance and get a behind-the-scenes look at what goes into such a major game!

programme.title: Teaching Dad To Play Rainbow Six Siege
programme.desc: Video games are a powerful escape and form a unique bond for many. Today, we’re bridging that connection by having our Rainbow Six Siege team teach their dads to play R6 for the first time—bringing family closer through gaming!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: We’ll always cherish Zai! This episode revisits his standout TI performances and offers a behind-the-scenes look at our Dota team's preparation. See their highs and lows, focus strategies, and the intense scrimmages leading up to TI.

programme.title: The Best Of All Games
programme.desc: Team Liquid showcases its versatility: YEKINDAR and oSee teach newcomers in Counter-Strike, the Team Liquid Guild presents a Tindral Sageswift Mythic guide for raids, and 5 Challenger players attempt to identify the faker among them.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: We're back with the LCS Summer Split Tailgate featuring Academy Coach Spawn! Join us as Coach Spawn dives into this year's team strengths and areas for improvement. Don’t miss his expert insights and analysis on how teams are shaping up!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Hot Juans: Can Mango handle the heat?
programme.desc: Welcome back to Hot Juans! Mango and HungryBox tackle the world’s spiciest wings while answering tough questions about Super Smash Bros. Melee and their personal lives. Get to know Mango better as he endures the heat—how will he handle it?

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Best of the best: Valorant Edition
programme.desc: What is the most iconic VCT clip of all time? Tune in as the entire Team Liquid Valorant roster ranks the top clips in a bracket-style showdown. Discover which clip comes out on top and see if you agree with the pros' rankings. Which clip is your favorite?

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: A new, never-before-seen Dota 2 challenge awaits! Watch Team Liquid attempt to win a game without dying or killing any enemies, with five chances to succeed. Will they rise to the challenge or falter under pressure? Plus, catch a behind-the-scenes look at Matumbaman’s rough trip to Texas, full of unexpected hurdles.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome back to Time Lapse! Watch Zai’s incredible 1v9 performance that earned him over $1 million in prize money. Relive his unforgettable backdoor against Talon, and gain insights into his mindset during the match. Discover how reviewing your gameplay can boost your own skills.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Do you believe in miracles?!: TL takes TI 11
programme.desc: Do you believe in miracles? Witness Team Liquid's legendary TI run in Dota 2! Starting in a tough spot and battling through Last Chance Qualification, their incredible comeback is a must-see. Don’t miss this historic event!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Hot Juans: Mew2King is the King
programme.desc: Hot Juans is back and better than ever! Join us with Hungrybox and Mew2King as they tackle increasingly spicy wings and tough questions. With double the Smash gods on stage, it’s sure to be a fiery episode. Will Mew2King handle the heat? Tune in to find out!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: CounterStrike Phenomenon! Explore the history of CS, including the story of a map that led to a nationwide ban in Brazil. Watch Team Liquid CS dive into CS2 public matchmaking and experience the excitement. Finally, catch a recap of IEM Cologne with the new squad—where things didn’t go as planned.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome back to Time Lapse! Join Qojqva and Taiga as they revisit one of Taiga’s biggest oversights. Then, watch the team tackle a full Dota 2 game on a massive 5-meter-long keyboard. Don’t miss these epic moments!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome back to Timelapse! This episode explores the origins of Polish superstar Nisha, featuring old clips that highlight his standout moments and why we recruited him. Also, revisit some of Team Liquid's top games against Nisha before he joined us full-time.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: In this episode of Squad, follow the team’s journey to South Korea for Worlds. Experience the thrill of being an underdog, uncover the off-screen skills needed for top-level play, and go behind the scenes of their rollercoaster tournament experience.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Coaching Noobs: League of Legends Edition
programme.desc: Ever wondered what it’s like to be coached by a pro? Watch Bwipo guide a League of Legends newbie with tips and tricks you might have missed. Then, see if staff member Kold can handle the pressure as he faces off against pro player Santorin.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: We’re back with another episode of Hot Juans, the show inspired by another but with our own twist. Join Hungrybox and Zain, top Super Smash Bros. players, as they discuss everything from Smash and other video games to terminal velocity and skydiving. Don’t miss this diverse and exciting episode!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Get to know Team Liquid: LoL Edition
programme.desc: Can Team Liquid’s manager Ben prove he knows Alphari and his players inside out? Find out as he answers questions about them. Next, watch Tactical and CoreJJ in thrilling 1v1s, and wrap up with a heartwarming "Draw My Life" for CoreJJ.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Team Liquid faces the biggest PUBG tournament of the year in "Survival"! Follow their preparation and gameplay as they vie for the top spot. Will they emerge victorious? Tune in to see their journey and the challenges they encounter!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Bigger isn't always better! Watch our Dota 2 team tackle a 1 vs. 1 challenge using the world’s largest keyboard and mouse—a 14:1 scale Alienware AW420K and AW720M. See their performance and then join us in Time Lapse to witness Team Liquid break Secret's dominance and get a behind-the-scenes look at what goes into such a major game!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: League of Legends is not all serious!
programme.desc: League of Legends is more than competitive! Watch Neeko play hide and seek with 100T Tenacity for $10K in Summoner’s Rift, then see our team guess fake LoL skins. Finally, Broxah joins to share the ultimate Wukong jungle guide.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: World of Warcraft Mythic Guides Part. 2

Discover strategies and tips for maximizing their potential to secure your next victory and excel at the highest level.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Time Lapse is back with a new episode! Join Zai and Blitz as they revisit the epic EG vs EHOME match from TI6. Watch them relive legendary plays, laugh at old mistakes, and dive into this classic Dota 2 showdown.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: HyperX Table Talk: The Fnatic dumpster fire
programme.desc: Welcome back to HyperX Table Talk! Bwipo and Broxah return to discuss the Fnatic "dumpster fire," their experiences in professional League of Legends, and their futures. Bwipo reveals his desire to return to pro play—will he have the commitment to reach the top again?

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: HyperX Table Talk: The Struggles of North American LoL
programme.desc: On HyperX Table Talk, Bwipo and Broxah discuss North America's League of Legends scene and how the West stacks up globally. They explore what it would take for the West to win Worlds and delve into personal IRL topics to get to know the players better.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Join Team Liquid in Lima, Peru! Follow their Dota 2 roster as they prepare for and compete in the latest major. Get a behind-the-scenes look at their journey and preparations, then watch them battle for victory in the tournament!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Everyone loves fast food! Watch CadiaN and Skullz create a tier list of American classics like McDonald's and Burger King. Then, catch our new Counter-Strike roster’s first match and go behind the scenes to see the emotions of assembling the team. Don’t miss this episode—let’s go Team Liquid!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Time to learn from our mistakes
programme.desc: Join Team Liquid as we revisit a tough loss from our first LCS match. Watch our players analyze mistakes, learn, and prepare for the next opportunity. Our dedication to improvement shows that there's always room for growth, no matter your skill level.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Wards are crucial! Discover how Team Liquid uses wards throughout the game, from early to late stages. Learn the best current meta for warding, strategies for winning games, and role-specific tips. This is the ultimate guide to mastering ward placement in Dota 2.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: League of Legends: Casting Vs. Playing
programme.desc: Welcome! Catch up with Huni and Reignover as they reflect on their time playing together. Explore the casting world versus being a player, and don’t miss the thrilling rematch between Team Liquid and T1. It’s an episode you’ll want to see!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: "The race for World’s First heats up! Watch Team Liquid’s World of Warcraft guild take on the elusive Mythic Tindral Sageswift and other fierce bosses like Mythic Council of Dreams, Mythic Nymue, World’s First Mythic Smolderon, and Mythic Fyrakk. Will they rise to the challenge?"

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Team Liquid takes down the Six Invitational

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Survival ep.1: Team Liquid takes on the biggest PUBG tournament of the year
programme.desc: Can Team Liquid PUBG handle the biggest tournament ever? Watch "Survival" for a deep dive into one of the world’s largest PUBG events. Follow the team’s journey and see Jeemz share highlights and lowlights from the tournament's start!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: World of Warcraft Mythic Guides Part. 1
programme.desc: Welcome back to Team Liquid’s Dota 2 strategy guides! Today, we cover two crucial strategies: the Fyrakk mythic guide and the Tindral Sageswift guide. These tips could make the difference in your next match, so watch till the end for insider insights from our pros.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: The only time North America Succeeded

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: World of Warcraft: Race for World's First

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: How a role change can change the world!

Witness CoreJJ’s remarkable evolution from his early days to becoming a top support player.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Squad: Five playoff Series, three worlds seeds, and a penta
programme.desc: Welcome back to Squad! Watch the final League Championship Series Summer split push and the team’s international journey. Get an inside look at game prep, player emotions, and more. With 5 series, 3 Worlds seeds, and one penta, it’s a must-watch!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: We're back with another episode of Hot Juans! Join Team Liquid’s Dabuz, a pro Super Smash Bros. Melee player, as he answers questions about Smash Bros., video games, and anime while eating increasingly hot wings. Don't miss this fiery and fun episode!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Hot Juans: Can Mango handle the heat?

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: A new, never-before-seen Dota 2 challenge awaits! Watch Team Liquid attempt to win a game without dying or killing any enemies, with five chances to succeed. Will they rise to the challenge or falter under pressure? Plus, catch a behind-the-scenes look at Matumbaman’s rough trip to Texas, full of unexpected hurdles.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: The Ultimate World of Warcraft Boss Guide Part. 1
