programme.title: 3 Pros Vs. 5 Golds
programme.desc: Today’s episode kicks off with FalleN’s legendary Counter-Strike wallbang shots, showcasing his peak skills and the unforgettable crowd reactions. Then, watch as three League of Legends pros attempt to take down a full team of gold players. Will they dominate?

programme.title: Ultimate Dota 2 Warding Guide
programme.desc: Warding is essential for Dota 2 success! In this episode, we present a detailed guide on using early, mid, and late-game wards effectively. Learn how to maximize map vision and secure more victories in your games!

programme.title: Beyond the Green Veil
programme.desc: Beyond the Green Veil unveils how logging shapes access as surfers and skiers rethink conservation.

programme.title: Go Easy on the Zambezi
programme.desc: Take It Easy On The Zambezi, featuring Mikey February, Dylan Graves, and Harry Bryant, on what Graves calls the biggest adventure he's ever taken in search of surf, deep into the heart of Sub-Saharan Africa.

programme.title: Heavy Water
programme.desc: Heavy Water is a Michael Oblowitz film, produced by Red Bull Media House and All Edge Entertainment, that follows the life and times of Nathan Fletcher, part of the royal family of surfing and a key figure in big wave history.

programme.title: Havana Libre
programme.desc: After years of surfing being illegal, a diehard group of Cuban surfers fight to legitimize their passion. Havana Libre chronicles their fight in the face of political oppression, confronting borders and outdated ideologies along the way.

programme.title: Step into Liquid
programme.desc: Zigzagging from the waters off Ireland to Oahu's ripping North Shore, this documentary profiles the diverse and fascinating characters who have devoted their lives to catching the perfect wave.

programme.title: Kalani: Gift from Heaven
programme.desc: A short documentary film featuring waterman Kalani Lattanzi challenging the boundaries of Big Wave Surfing. Filmed in Nazare and Rio de Janeiro, he faces the biggest waves in the world, in the most pure form of wave riding: bodysurf.

programme.title: The Endless Summer
programme.desc: The crown jewel to ten years of Bruce Brown surfing documentaries. Brown follows two young surfers around the world in search of the perfect wave, and ends up finding quite a few in addition to some colorful local characters.

programme.title: Nervous Laughter
programme.desc: Nervous Laughter follows Maui's best surfers as they take on the island's giant wave, Jaws, and shatter expectations of what's possible in big wave surfing.

programme.title: Thundercloud REDUX
programme.desc: Thundercloud Redux documents the events of a perfect swell at Thundercloud Reef aka Cloudbreak on June 8th 2012. All the best big wave surfers had converged but there was an ASP surfing event taking place at the exact same time.

programme.title: Over the Edge
programme.desc: As COVID-19 casts a cloud of global uncertainty, and at home, his personal life is changing course, Over the Edge follows big wave surfer Matt Bromley as he travels to the heaviest surf spots in the world, chasing the ride of his life.

programme.title: Tokyo Rising
programme.desc: John John Florence puts his career on the line against Kelly Slater to qualify for surfings debut in the 2020 Olympics.

programme.title: View from a Blue Moon
programme.desc: See the sport of surfing as its never been captured before in John Florence and Blake Vincent Kuenys second signature release, this time in association with the award-winning film studio, Brain Farm.

programme.title: PAIGE
programme.desc: A closer look into the life of Paige Alms, one of the best big wave surfers in the world, as she trains mentally and physically for the 2017 Pe'ahi Challenge (Jaws) on Maui, conquering 40-50 foot waves, and inspiring the next generation.

programme.title: Paradigm Lost
programme.desc: Filmed over three years, in six countries, Paradigm Lost captures the highest level of water sports action in beautiful 4K. In between the action are heartfelt stories of the characters at the top of their sports.

programme.title: Big Wave Tow-In Invitational
programme.desc: Five of the world's most prolific big wave riders charge 30-foot waves at the center of the big wave universe.

programme.title: Peel: The Peru Project
programme.desc: Wes Brown and TJ Barrack take their film crew to the rugged deserts and jungles in Peru with some of the world's best surfers.

programme.title: Ground Swell: Epic Stories of Monster Waves
programme.desc: Showcasing the most famous big wave spots on the planet and the surfers who tackled them.

programme.title: Ground Swell: Other Side of Fear
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the 2021-22 big wave season through the eyes of legendary surfers.

programme.title: Psychic Migrations
programme.desc: Psychic Migrations is a cerebral surf odyssey through the vivid textures - of the West Indies, East Indies, Australia, Polynesia, Central and South - America.

programme.title: Empire of Surf
programme.desc: Be on the inside of how these parks and tech are put together.

programme.title: Self Discovery for Social Survival
programme.desc: A Mexican Summer and Pilgrim Surf + Supply film, Self Discovery for Social Survival is an exploration of sound and pro-surf, conjuring a surreal symbiosis of music, the environment and local culture.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Serging Knits
programme.desc: Angela Wolf demonstrates serging knits.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Refashion with Lace Inserts
programme.desc: Angela Wolf refashions with lace inserts.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Skirt with Pockets
programme.desc: Learn how to make a beautiful skirt with pockets!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Adding Pockets to Joggers
programme.desc: Learn how to add comfortable pockets to your joggers.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Turn a Sports Bra to a Tank Top
programme.desc: Lean how to turn your sports bra to a tank top!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Lace Insert Knit Top
programme.desc: Learn how to make a lace insert knit top with Angela!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Tank Top Lace Trim
programme.desc: Learn how to make a comfortable tank top with Angela!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: One Armed Tee
programme.desc: Learn how to make a one armed tee with Angela!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Sparking Tableware
programme.desc: Learn how to make sparkling tableware with Angela!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: T-Shirt Dress
programme.desc: Angela shows how to create a dress out of a simple t-shirt.

programme.title: For What It's Worth: Episode 6
programme.desc: For What It's Worth is an exciting and compelling new quiz show hosted by Fern Britton who is assisted by a different BBC antiques expert each day.

programme.title: For What It's Worth: Episode 7
programme.desc: For What It's Worth is an exciting and compelling new quiz show hosted by Fern Britton who is assisted by a different BBC antiques expert each day.

programme.title: For What It's Worth: Episode 8
programme.desc: For What It's Worth is an exciting and compelling new quiz show hosted by Fern Britton who is assisted by a different BBC antiques expert each day.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Dice Tower with Flocking Demo
programme.desc: A simple dice tower that randomizes your rolls and keeps the dice from falling off the table.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: David Marks Shop Tour
programme.desc: Last summer, on our Gadget Station delivery trip, we decided to stop and visit the one and only David Marks. If you’re not familiar with David, he is an incredible woodworker/designer and used to host a show on HGTV and the DIY Network called Woodworks. His show was a huge influence on me personally and I know thousands of other woodworkers feel the same way.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: David Marks Gallery Tour
programme.desc: In this David Marks Gallery Tour, you’ll see David’s wood boiling apparatus and his art gallery. David recently added an additional two-story building to his property and dedicated it to displaying his various turnings and furniture pieces all for the enjoyment of his students, visitors, and guests. The gallery contains many beautiful pieces by David as well as other amazing woodworkers.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: David Marks Project in Progress
programme.desc: This is a quick tour of David Marks project in progress. David loves to make massive turned sculptures and his current project is a doozie! It’s a huge disc-shaped turned piece featuring a big marquetry image on the front. I hope you enjoy this as much as I did. It’s almost like an episode of Woodworks! Well, sort of.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Durable Outdoor Finish
programme.desc: Looking for a durable outdoor finish? You've come to the right place! Looking for an inexpensive solution that will never require any maintenance? This is not the finish for you.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Duane’s Steamer Trunk Part 1
programme.desc: This project was built and filmed in an effort to assist my new friend, Duane. The video gives the whole story. This first part focuses on building the frames that make up the sides of the trunk case. I cover numerous topics, but I spend a significant amount of time on grain matching.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Duane’s Steamer Trunk Part 2
programme.desc: Moving right along, we continue cutting and assembling parts for the steamer trunk. I spend a good deal of time on techniques that will help you when working with plans. The key is to realize that some parts need to be cut using measurements from your project, not from the plan itself. I also spend some time creating the thicker top panels.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Duane’s Steamer Trunk Part 3
programme.desc: I go over some pre-finishing tips and finish the inside of the trunk. I then go through the entire assembly and glueup process from start to finish. I then discuss the trunk’s lid, which is different from the original plan.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Duane’s Steamer Trunk Part 4
programme.desc: The final installment of the Steamer Trunk series. I apply the faux walnut straps, apply the water-based finish using my HVLP turbine, and install the tansu hardware. All in all, this was a great project that really reinforces simple frame and panel construction.

programme.title: Moogly: What's That Mean Anyway?
programme.desc: A look at some of the most often asked crochet questions

programme.title: Moogly: Whoops! Fixing Errors
programme.desc: Here's how to fix those crochet mistakes

programme.title: Violent City
programme.desc: After being double-crossed by his mistress and barely escaping a murder attempt, a hit-man sets out to take his revenge on the woman and the mob boss who put her up to it.

programme.title: White Fang
programme.desc: The wolf dog, aids a reporter, a fur trapper, a nun, a young Eskimo boy and his father in ridding a gold mining town of a sleazy crime lord in 1896 Yukon in Canada.

programme.title: The Assassination Bureau
programme.desc: Ivan is a self-confident chief of an association of hit men for hire, who will refuse no well-paid offer--especially the lucrative challenge of an aspiring reporter. Reasoning that a running cat-and-mouse duel with his henchmen will rid the organization of incompetents, Ivan agrees to become the object of a nonstop hunt.

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: Welcome to Episode 21 of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show presented by Duke Cannon! Whipsnakes attackmen TJ Malone joins the show! He breaks down the Whips comeback win over the Atlas, and how he navigates the season while working in investment banking. Week 3 was a wild one. Michael Sowers the frontrunner for MVP? Are we worried about the Atlas? Are the Outlaws hitting their stride? The guys look ahead to next weeks "Teat vs Sowers" matchup.

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: David and the team kick off their first series of ghost hunts. Things do not start off as smoothly as expected.

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: Drama unfolds when David and the team investigate the ghost of a young actor at a local theater camp. Upon learning more they become suspicious of the circumstances of his death.

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: The ghost team is confronted by rival ghost hunters before they are called to a home in broad daylight to deal with some possessed items.

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: In a miscommunication the ghost team is called in to assist with some ghosts that might be fresher than they are used to.

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: Tom and the team are brought in by a local fraternity to communicate with their dead frat president in order to find missing charity money.

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: Tom gets a gig for the crew that pays well. Unfortunately David is confronted with his biggest fear. Clowns.

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: A priest calls the ghost team in to deal with an exorcism. They find themselves in over their head dealing with the Phantom Whackers and a possessed child.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Veteran security guard Randall Harrison and his less than enthusiastic partner Alex, attempt to bring peace and quiet to the neighborhood after responding to a string of noise complaints against a popular social media influencer who refuses to follow the rules.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex have to clean up the streets....literally. When one of the residents in the neighborhood is not properly cleaning up after their dog, its up to Randall and Alex to figure out who the crap culprit is and nab them before its too late.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex discuss their preferred pistachio preference. They meet a foreign invader with a surprising connection to Alex. The guys then rescue an injured jogger while an out-of-control chiropractor keeps getting in the way.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: The guys protect the neighborhood from a foreign invader and rescue an injured jogger from an out of control chiropractor.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex confront a resident about Christmas decorations in July and a man running an overly sexual yoga class in the park. When Dankbank gets into an argument with a neighborhood Karen on the loose, Randall and Alex are forced to play mediator.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex debate over the best Batman actor while attempting to solve a problem from a resident they can't understand. While looking for clues, Alex has another run- in with the neighborhood social justice warriors who again challenge his level of 'wokeness'.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex break up an altercation between two suburban women ready to fight it out. Randall is forced to confront and shut down Dankbank's out of control party alone after Alex is called away by HR, but it gives Alex the chance to finally get some alone time with his crush.

programme.sub-title: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School

programme.title: El Coyote Mente Diabolica
programme.desc: Bulmaro Reyes comandante retirado de la policía, debido a su violento carácter que quiso asesinar al hombre que mato a su familia, se ve obligado a ir en busca de aquel hombre que se ha fugado y que por sanguinario le llaman el coyote. apoyado por su excompañero en la policía, el comandante Ríos inicia una insólita persecución a caballo en busca del asesino.

programme.title: El Aguila Descalza
programme.desc: Un hombre idealista y soñador, trata de resolver los problemas del pueblo mexicano, principalmente de la clase trabajadora, pero muy a su manera de pensar, logrando resolverlos de tal manera, que además de hacrlo reir, lo hará reflexionar

programme.title: La Formula de Rasputin
programme.desc: En una vecindad de la gran metrópoli, Don Otilio, boticario de mucha fama, descubre un remedio para los males cardiacos, que aumenta el ritmo del corazón. Rasputín, habitante de la misma vecindad y dedicado a sacar dinero vía limpias y procedimientos esotéricos, busca crear un elixir exótico para ayudar a sus clientes, pero no conduce mas que a reclamos y amenazas de quienes lo compran. Don Otilio accidentalmente ingiere su propio remedio, pero tiene un paro cardiaco y cae fulminado, todos ayudan y Rasputín es presionado para que intervenga y cure a Don Otilio. solo se le ocurre darle el elixir exótico, la combinación de estas dos formulas revive a Don Otilio y se crea el súper elixir que genera una gran noticia a nivel mundial.

programme.title: Día de Gracia El Shaka
programme.desc: Zona controla el tráfico en su territorio a través de “Radio Buchón”. Atila y “El Potrillo” se encargan de que las órdenes de arriba se cumplan. Chano esta a cargo de entregar la mercancía a Zona y sus asociados.

programme.title: El Destazador
programme.desc: Everardo, famoso líder obrero de la industria de la carne, es victima de un complot político para asesinarlo. El atentado se efectúa el día señalado y a la hora prevista y sus enemigos creyéndolo muerto disfrutan de sus bienes, pero lo que ellos no saben es que el esta vivo con una identidad diferente y lo apodan “El Destazador”

programme.desc: All of the action from the Macau Grand Prix in 1989, part 1 of 2.

programme.title: 71st Macau GP: Macau GT Cup - FIA GT World Cup - Race
programme.desc: Watch the livestream of the 71st Macau Grand Prix Macau GT Cup 16 lap race as it happens.

programme.title: Fusion, Motorsport meets Sim Racing
programme.desc: BMW Motorsport merges reality and simulation. BMW Group Motorsport team collaborates with Fanatec to develop the new BMW M4 GT3 steering wheel.

programme.title: IndyCar vs Formula 1 car: Technical Comparison
programme.desc: Which is faster: Lewis Hamilton's Formula 1 car, or Scott Dixon's Indycar? Both have had major success in their respective championships, but how different are the two machines? Using our latest 3D animations, Jake Boxall-Legge breaks down everything there is to compare Indycar and Formule 1 cars, from aerodynamics, power, tyres, fuel and more.

programme.title: How Formula 1 Setups Change For Downforce Vs Power Tracks
programme.desc: What makes a Formula 1 downforce track different to a power track? We've all heard the terms before, but different tracks require vastly different car setups to get the maximum advantage around a lap. But what are these requirements? Jake Boxall-Legge dives into why Imola, Monaco, Silverstone and Monza all require different changes to a car to succeed across the board.

programme.title: The banned Lotus that wasn't actually very good
programme.desc: The twin-chassis Lotus 88 is considered the last truly ground-breaking design attempted by Colin Chapman, but we never found out how fast it could have been because it was never allowed to race. However, as Giorgio Piola reveals, while rivals feared the concept, its drivers were not convinced the 88 would have delivered on the track. How did it work? Jake Boxall-Legge guides you through Chapman's complex idea to make ground effect cars more user-friendly.

programme.title: Everything You Need to Know About TYRES in Motorsport
programme.desc: Tyres play a vital role in getting the driver from A to B in a race. Here's the rundown of the variety of tyres and how they are used across different motorsports. programme.title: Motorsport Images: An Enduring Legacy
programme.desc: 26 million images. 100 years of racing. This is the story of Motorsport Images, the premiere photographic agency and archive covering motorsport and motoring. It is unique in that it provides photography of all major current motorsport events, from Formula One Grand Prix racing to national level racing, as well as archive images documenting the history of the sport dating back to 1895.

programme.desc: The Great Siberian Traverse documents a 6,000-mile ski journey through Russia, along the Trans-Siberian Railway. programme.desc: Stormchasing developed in Australia in the same period – the 1990s – as it developed in the American Midwest. In the first week of December – the height of storm season in Australia, we plan to travel with Jimmy Deguara, the most experienced of Australian stormchasers.

programme.title: Angry Planet

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.sub-title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Hell or High Winds
programme.desc: Stop me if you heard this one before? What's fast, windy, and can ruin your day in seconds? Of course, we're talking about the weather. And over the next half hour, we'll be bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera; from hailstorms to tornados and everything in between, we're going to show it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.sub-title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Tip of the Ice Storm
